Gen 17:8 ב: the land wherein thou art a stranger,
Gen 17:8 ג: all the land of Canaan,
Gen 17:8 ד: for an everlasting possession;
Gen 17:8 ה: and I will be their God.
Gen 17:9 א: And God said unto Abraham,
Gen 17:9 ב: Thou shalt keep my covenant therefore,
Gen 17:9 ג: thou, and thy seed after thee in their generations.
Gen 17:10 א: This [is] my covenant, which ye shall keep,
Gen 17:10 ב: between me and you
Gen 17:10 ג: and thy seed after thee;
Gen 17:10 ד: Every man child among you shall be circumcised.
Gen 17:11 א: And ye shall circumcise the flesh of your foreskin;
Gen 17:11 ב: and it shall be a token of the covenant betwixt me and you.
Gen 17:12 א: And he that is eight days old shall be circumcised among you,
Gen 17:12 ב: every man child in your generations,
Gen 17:12 ג: he that is born in the house,
Gen 17:12 ד: or bought with money of any stranger,
Gen 17:12 ה: which [is] not of thy seed.
Gen 17:13 א: He that is born in thy house, [...] must needs be circumcised:
Gen 17:13 ב: and he that is bought with thy money,
Gen 17:13 ג: and my covenant shall be in your flesh for an everlasting covenant.
Gen 17:14 א: And the uncircumcised man child
Gen 17:14 ב: whose flesh of his foreskin is not circumcised,
Gen 17:14 ג: that soul shall be cut off from his people;
Gen 17:14 ד: he hath broken my covenant.
Gen 17:15 א: And God said unto Abraham,
Gen 17:15 ב: As for Sarai thy wife,
Gen 17:15 ג: thou shalt not call her name Sarai,
Gen 17:15 ד: but Sarah [shall] her name [be].
Gen 17:16 א: And I will bless her,
Gen 17:16 ב: and give thee a son also of her:
Gen 17:16 ג: yea, I will bless her,
Gen 17:16 ד: and she shall be [a mother] of nations;
Gen 17:16 ה: kings of people shall be of her.
Gen 17:17 א: Then Abraham fell upon his face,
Gen 17:17 ב: and laughed, and said in his heart,
Gen 17:17 ג: Shall [a child] be born unto him that is an hundred years old?
Gen 17:17 ד: and shall Sarah, that is ninety years old, bear?
Gen 17:18 א: And Abraham said unto God,
Gen 17:18 ב: O that Ishmael might live before thee!
Gen 17:19 א: And God said,
Gen 17:19 ב: Sarah thy wife shall bear thee a son indeed;
Gen 17:19 ג: and thou shalt call his name Isaac:
Gen 17:19 ד: and I will establish my covenant with him
Gen 17:19 ה: for an everlasting covenant, [and] with his seed after him.
Gen 17:20 א: And as for Ishmael, I have heard thee:
Gen 17:20 ב: Behold, I have blessed him,
Gen 17:20 ג: and will make him fruitful,
Gen 17:20 ד: and will multiply him exceedingly;
Gen 17:20 ה: twelve princes shall he beget,
Gen 17:20 ו: and I will make him a great nation.
Gen 17:21 א: But my covenant will I establish with Isaac,
Gen 17:21 ב: which Sarah shall bear unto thee
Gen 17:21 ג: at this set time in the next year.
Gen 17:22 א: And he left off talking with him,
Gen 17:22 ב: and God went up from Abraham.
Gen 17:23 א: And Abraham took Ishmael his son,
Gen 17:23 ב: and all that were born in his house,
Gen 17:23 ג: and all that were bought with his money,
Gen 17:23 ד: every male among the men of Abraham’s house;
Gen 17:23 ה: and circumcised the flesh of their foreskin
Gen 17:23 ו: in the selfsame day,
Gen 17:23 ז: as God had said unto him.
Gen 17:24 א: And Abraham [was] ninety years old and nine,
Gen 17:24 ב: when he was circumcised in the flesh of his foreskin.
Gen 17:25 א: And Ishmael his son [was] thirteen years old,
Gen 17:25 ב: when he was circumcised in the flesh of his foreskin.
Gen 17:26 א: In the selfsame day
Gen 17:26 ב: was Abraham circumcised, and Ishmael his son.
Gen 17:27 א: And all the men of his house,
Gen 17:27 ב: born in the house,
Gen 17:27 ג: and bought with money of the stranger,
Gen 17:27 ד: were circumcised with him.
Gen 18:1 א: And the LORD appeared unto him in the plains of Mamre:
Gen 18:1 ב: and he sat in the tent door
Gen 18:1 ג: in the heat of the day;
Gen 18:2 א: And he lift up his eyes and looked, and, lo,
Gen 18:2 ב: three men stood by him:
Gen 18:2 ג: and when he saw [them], he ran to meet them from the tent door,
Gen 18:2 ד: and bowed himself toward the ground,
Gen 18:3 א: And said, My Lord,
Gen 18:3 ב: if now I have found favour in thy sight,
Gen 18:3 ג: pass not away, I pray thee, from thy servant:
Gen 18:4 א: Let a little water, I pray you, be fetched,
Gen 18:4 ב: and wash your feet,
Gen 18:4 ג: and rest yourselves under the tree:
Gen 18:5 א: And I will fetch a morsel of bread,
Gen 18:5 ב: and comfort ye your hearts;
Gen 18:5 ג: after that ye shall pass on:
Gen 18:5 ד: for therefore are ye come to your servant.
Gen 18:5 ה: And they said, So do, as thou hast said.
Gen 18:6 א: And Abraham hastened into the tent
Gen 18:6 ב: unto Sarah, and said,
Gen 18:6 ג: Make ready quickly three measures of fine meal,
Gen 18:6 ד: knead [it], and make cakes upon the hearth.

meaning: bread on a stick (she be rotated)

kjv: Gen 18:7 א: And Abraham ran unto the herd,
Gen 18:7 ב: and fetcht a calf tender and good,
Gen 18:7 ג: and gave [it] unto a young man;
Gen 18:7 ד: and he hasted to dress it.
Gen 18:8 א: And he took butter, and milk,
Gen 18:8 ב: and the calf which he had dressed,
Gen 18:8 ג: and set [it] before them;
Gen 18:8 ד: and he stood by them under the tree,
Gen 18:8 ה: and they did eat.
Gen 18:9 א: And they said unto him,
Gen 18:9 ב: Where [is] Sarah thy wife?
Gen 18:9 ג: And he said, Behold, in the tent.
Gen 18:10 א: And he said,
Gen 18:10 ב: I will certainly return unto thee according to the time of life;
Gen 18:10 ג: and, lo, Sarah thy wife shall have a son.
Gen 18:10 ד: And Sarah heard [it] in the tent door,
Gen 18:10 ה: which [was] behind him.
Gen 18:11 א: Now Abraham and Sarah [were] old
Gen 18:11 ב: [and] well stricken in age;
Gen 18:11 ג: [and] it ceased to be with Sarah after the manner of women.
Gen 18:12 א: Therefore Sarah laughed within herself, saying,
Gen 18:12 ב: After I am waxed old shall I have pleasure,
Gen 18:12 ג: my lord being old also?
Gen 18:13 א: And the LORD said unto Abraham,
Gen 18:13 ב: Wherefore did Sarah laugh, saying,
Gen 18:13 ג: Shall I of a surety bear a child, which am old?
Gen 18:14 א: Is any thing too hard for the LORD?
Gen 18:14 ב: At the time appointed I will return unto thee,
Gen 18:14 ג: according to the time of life,
Gen 18:14 ד: and Sarah shall have a son.
Gen 18:15 א: Then Sarah denied, saying,
Gen 18:15 ב: I laughed not;
Gen 18:15 ג: for she was afraid.
Gen 18:15 ד: And he said, Nay; but thou didst laugh.
Gen 18:16 א: And the men rose up from thence,
Gen 18:16 ב: and looked toward Sodom:
Gen 18:16 ג: and Abraham went with them to bring them on the way.
Gen 18:17 א: And the LORD said,
Gen 18:17 ב: Shall I hide from Abraham that thing which I do;
Gen 18:18 א: Seeing that Abraham shall surely become a great and mighty nation,
Gen 18:18 ב: and all the nations of the earth shall be blessed in him?
Gen 18:19 א: For I know him,
Gen 18:19 ב: that he will command his children and his household after him,
Gen 18:19 ג: and they shall keep the way of the LORD,
Gen 18:19 ד: to do justice and judgment;
Gen 18:19 ה: that the LORD may bring upon Abraham
Gen 18:19 ו: that which he hath spoken of him.
Gen 18:20 א: And the LORD said,
Gen 18:20 ב: the cry of Sodom and Gomorrah
Gen 18:20 ג: Because [...] is great,
Gen 18:20 ד: and [...] their sin
Gen 18:20 ה: because [...] is very grievous;
Gen 18:21 א: I will go down now, and see whether
Gen 18:21 ב: according to the cry of it, which is come unto me;
Gen 18:21 ג: they have done altogether
Gen 18:21 ד: and if not, I will know.
Gen 18:22 א: And the men turned their faces from thence,
Gen 18:22 ב: and went toward Sodom:
Gen 18:22 ג: but Abraham stood yet before the LORD.
Gen 18:23 א: And Abraham drew near, and said,
Gen 18:23 ב: Wilt thou also destroy the righteous with the wicked?
Gen 18:24 א: Peradventure there be fifty righteous within the city:
Gen 18:24 ב: wilt thou also destroy and not spare the place
Gen 18:24 ג: for the fifty righteous that [are] therein?
Gen 18:25 א: That be far from thee to do after this manner,
Gen 18:25 ב: to slay the righteous with the wicked:
Gen 18:25 ג: and that the righteous should be as the wicked,
Gen 18:25 ד: that be far from thee:
Gen 18:25 ה: Shall [...] the Judge of all the earth
Gen 18:25 ו: not [...] do right?
Gen 18:26 א: And the LORD said,
Gen 18:26 ב: If I find in Sodom fifty righteous within the city,
Gen 18:26 ג: then I will spare all the place for their sakes.
Gen 18:27 א: And Abraham answered and said,
Gen 18:27 ב: Behold now, I have taken upon me to speak unto the Lord,
Gen 18:27 ג: which [am but] dust and ashes:
Gen 18:28 א: Peradventure there shall lack five of the fifty righteous:
Gen 18:28 ב: wilt thou destroy all the city for [lack of] five?
Gen 18:28 ג: And he said, [...] I will not destroy [it].
Gen 18:28 ד: If I find there forty and five,
Gen 18:29 א: And he spake unto him yet again, and said,
Gen 18:29 ב: Peradventure there shall be forty found there.
Gen 18:29 ג: And he said, I will not do [it] for forty’s sake.
Gen 18:30 א: And he said [unto him],
Gen 18:30 ב: Oh let not the Lord be angry, and I will speak:
Gen 18:30 ג: Peradventure there shall thirty be found there.
Gen 18:30 ד: And he said, I will not do [it], if I find thirty there.
Gen 18:31 א: And he said, Behold now, I have taken upon me to speak unto the Lord:
Gen 18:31 ב: Peradventure there shall be twenty found there.
Gen 18:31 ג: And he said, I will not destroy [it] for twenty’s sake.
Gen 18:32 א: And he said,
Gen 18:32 ב: Oh let not the Lord be angry, and I will speak yet but this once:
Gen 18:32 ג: Peradventure ten shall be found there.
Gen 18:32 ד: And he said, I will not destroy [it] for ten’s sake.
Gen 18:33 א: And the LORD went his way,
Gen 18:33 ב: as soon as he had left communing with Abraham:
Gen 18:33 ג: and Abraham returned unto his place.
Gen 19:1 א: And there came two angels to Sodom at even;
Gen 19:1 ב: and Lot sat in the gate of Sodom:
Gen 19:1 ג: and Lot seeing [them] rose up to meet them;
Gen 19:1 ד: and he bowed himself with his face toward the ground;
Gen 19:2 א: And he said, Behold now, my lords,
Gen 19:2 ב: turn in, I pray you, into your servant’s house,
Gen 19:2 ג: and tarry all night, and wash your feet,
Gen 19:2 ד: and ye shall rise up early, and go on your ways.
Gen 19:2 ה: And they said, Nay; but we will abide in the street all night.
Gen 19:3 א: And he pressed upon them greatly; and they turned in unto him,
Gen 19:3 ב: and entered into his house;
Gen 19:3 ג: and he made them a feast,
Gen 19:3 ד: and did bake unleavened bread,
Gen 19:3 ה: and they did eat.
Gen 19:4 א: But before they lay down,
Gen 19:4 ב: the men of the city, [even] the men of Sodom,
Gen 19:4 ג: compassed the house round,
Gen 19:4 ד: both old and young,
Gen 19:4 ה: all the people from every quarter:
Gen 19:5 א: And they called unto Lot, and said unto him,
Gen 19:5 ב: Where [are] the men which came in to thee this night?
Gen 19:5 ג: bring them out unto us, that we may know them.
Gen 19:6 א: And Lot went out at the door unto them,
Gen 19:6 ב: and shut the door after him,
Gen 19:7 א: And said, I pray you, brethren, do not so wickedly.
Gen 19:8 א: Behold now,
Gen 19:8 ב: I have two daughters which have not known man;
Gen 19:8 ג: let me, I pray you, bring them out unto you,
Gen 19:8 ד: and do ye to them as [is] good in your eyes:
Gen 19:8 ה: only unto these men do nothing;
Gen 19:8 ו: for therefore came they under the shadow of my roof.
Gen 19:9 א: And they said, Stand back.
Gen 19:9 ב: And they said [again], This one [fellow] came in to sojourn,
Gen 19:9 ג: and he will needs be a judge:
Gen 19:9 ד: now will we deal worse with thee, than with them.
Gen 19:9 ה: And they pressed sore upon the man, [even] Lot,
Gen 19:9 ו: and came near to break the door.
Gen 19:10 א: But the men put forth their hand,
Gen 19:10 ב: and pulled Lot into the house to them,
Gen 19:10 ג: and shut to the door.
Gen 19:11 א: And [...] the men that [were] at the door of the house
Gen 19:11 ב: they smote [...] with blindness,
Gen 19:11 ג: both small and great:
Gen 19:11 ד: so that they wearied themselves to find the door.
Gen 19:12 א: And the men said unto Lot,
Gen 19:12 ב: Hast thou here any besides?
Gen 19:12 ג: son in law, and thy sons, and thy daughters,
Gen 19:12 ד: and whatsoever thou hast in the city,
Gen 19:12 ה: bring [them] out of this place:
Gen 19:13 א: For we will destroy this place,
Gen 19:13 ב: because the cry of them is waxen great before the face of the LORD;
Gen 19:13 ג: and the LORD hath sent us to destroy it.
Gen 19:14 א: And Lot went out, and spake unto his sons in law,
Gen 19:14 ב: which married his daughters,
Gen 19:14 ג: and said, Up,
Gen 19:14 ד: get you out of this place;
Gen 19:14 ה: for the LORD will destroy this city.
Gen 19:14 ו: But he seemed as one that mocked unto his sons in law.
Gen 19:15 א: And when the morning arose,
Gen 19:15 ב: then the angels hastened Lot, saying, Arise,
Gen 19:15 ג: take thy wife,
Gen 19:15 ד: and thy two daughters, which are here;
Gen 19:15 ה: lest thou be consumed in the iniquity of the city.
Gen 19:16 א: And while he lingered, the men laid hold upon his hand,
Gen 19:16 ב: and upon the hand of his wife,
Gen 19:16 ג: and upon the hand of his two daughters;
Gen 19:16 ד: the LORD being merciful unto him:
Gen 19:16 ה: and they brought him forth,
Gen 19:16 ו: and set him without the city.
Gen 19:17 א: And it came to pass, when they had brought them forth abroad, that he said,
Gen 19:17 ב: Escape for thy life;
Gen 19:17 ג: look not behind thee,
Gen 19:17 ד: neither stay thou in all the plain;
Gen 19:17 ה: escape to the mountain, lest thou be consumed.
Gen 19:18 א: And Lot said unto them,
Gen 19:18 ב: Oh, not so, my Lord:
Gen 19:19 א: Behold now, thy servant hath found grace in thy sight,
Gen 19:19 ב: and thou hast magnified thy mercy, which thou hast shewed unto me
Gen 19:19 ג: in saving my life;
Gen 19:19 ד: and I cannot escape to the mountain,
Gen 19:19 ה: lest some evil take me, and I die:
Gen 19:20 א: Behold now,
Gen 19:20 ב: this city [is] near to flee unto,
Gen 19:20 ג: and it [is] a little one:
Gen 19:20 ד: Oh, let me escape thither,
Gen 19:20 ה: ([is] it not a little one?)
Gen 19:20 ו: and my soul shall live.
Gen 19:21 א: And he said unto him,
Gen 19:21 ב: See, I have accepted thee concerning this thing also,
Gen 19:21 ג: that I will not overthrow this city, for the which thou hast spoken.
Gen 19:22 א: Haste thee, escape thither;
Gen 19:22 ב: for I cannot do any thing
Gen 19:22 ג: till thou be come thither.
Gen 19:22 ד: Therefore the name of the city was called Zoar.
Gen 19:23 א: The sun was risen upon the earth
Gen 19:23 ב: when Lot entered into Zoar.
Gen 19:24 א: Then the LORD rained upon Sodom and upon Gomorrah
Gen 19:24 ב: brimstone and fire from the LORD
Gen 19:24 ג: out of heaven;
Gen 19:25 א: And he overthrew those cities,
Gen 19:25 ב: and all the plain,
Gen 19:25 ג: and all the inhabitants of the cities,
Gen 19:25 ד: and that which grew upon the ground.
Gen 19:26 א: But his wife looked back from behind him,
Gen 19:26 ב: and she became a pillar of salt.
Gen 19:27 א: And Abraham gat up early in the morning
Gen 19:27 ב: to the place where he stood before the LORD:
Gen 19:28 א: And he looked toward Sodom and Gomorrah,
Gen 19:28 ב: and toward all the land of the plain,
Gen 19:28 ג: and beheld, and, lo, the smoke of the country went up
Gen 19:28 ד: as the smoke of a furnace.
Gen 19:29 א: And it came to pass, when God destroyed the cities of the plain,
Gen 19:29 ב: that God remembered Abraham,
Gen 19:29 ג: and sent Lot out of the midst of the overthrow,
Gen 19:29 ד: when he overthrew the cities
Gen 19:29 ה: in the which Lot dwelt.
Gen 19:30 א: And Lot went up out of Zoar,
Gen 19:30 ב: and dwelt in the mountain,
Gen 19:30 ג: and his two daughters with him;
Gen 19:30 ד: for he feared to dwell in Zoar:
Gen 19:30 ה: and he dwelt in a cave,
Gen 19:30 ו: he and his two daughters.
Gen 19:31 א: And the firstborn said unto the younger,
Gen 19:31 ב: Our father [is] old,
Gen 19:31 ג: and [there is] not a man in the earth to come in unto us
Gen 19:31 ד: after the manner of all the earth:
Gen 19:32 א: Come, let us make our father drink wine,
Gen 19:32 ב: and we will lie with him, that we may preserve seed of our father.
Gen 19:33 א: And they made their father drink wine that night:
Gen 19:33 ב: and the firstborn went in, and lay with her father;
Gen 19:33 ג: and he perceived not when she lay down, nor when she arose.
Gen 19:34 א: And it came to pass on the morrow, that [...] said
Gen 19:34 ב: the firstborn [...] unto the younger,
Gen 19:34 ג: Behold, I lay yesternight with my father:
Gen 19:34 ד: let us make him drink wine this night also;
Gen 19:34 ה: and go thou in, [and] lie with him,
Gen 19:34 ו: that we may preserve seed of our father.
Gen 19:35 א: And they made [...] drink [...] that night also:
Gen 19:35 ב: their father [...] wine
Gen 19:35 ג: and the younger arose, and lay with him;
Gen 19:35 ד: and he perceived not when she lay down, nor when she arose.
Gen 19:36 א: Thus were both the daughters of Lot with child by their father.
Gen 19:37 א: And the firstborn bare a son,
Gen 19:37 ב: and called his name Moab:
Gen 19:37 ג: the same [is] the father of the Moabites unto this day.
Gen 19:38 א: And the younger, she also bare a son,
Gen 19:38 ב: and called his name Ben–ammi:
Gen 19:38 ג: the same [is] the father of the children of Ammon unto this day.
Gen 20:1 א: And Abraham journeyed from thence toward the south country,
Gen 20:1 ב: and dwelled between Kadesh and Shur,
Gen 20:1 ג: and sojourned in Gerar.
Gen 20:2 א: And Abraham said of Sarah his wife,
Gen 20:2 ב: She [is] my sister:
Gen 20:2 ג: and Abimelech king of Gerar sent,
Gen 20:2 ד: and took Sarah.
Gen 20:3 א: But God came to Abimelech in a dream by night,
Gen 20:3 ב: and said to him,
Gen 20:3 ג: Behold, thou [art but] a dead man, for the woman which thou hast taken;
Gen 20:3 ד: for she [is] a man’s wife.
Gen 20:4 א: But Abimelech had not come near her: and he said,
Gen 20:4 ב: Lord, wilt thou slay also a righteous nation?
Gen 20:5 א: Said he not unto me, She [is] my sister?
Gen 20:5 ב: and she, even she herself said, He [is] my brother:
Gen 20:5 ג: in the integrity of my heart
Gen 20:5 ד: and innocency of my hands
Gen 20:5 ה: have I done this.
Gen 20:6 א: And God said unto him in a dream,
Gen 20:6 ב: Yea, I know
Gen 20:6 ג: that thou didst this in the integrity of thy heart;
Gen 20:6 ד: for I also withheld thee from sinning against me:
Gen 20:6 ה: therefore suffered I thee not to touch her.
Gen 20:7 א: Now therefore restore the man [his] wife;
Gen 20:7 ב: for he [is] a prophet,
Gen 20:7 ג: and he shall pray for thee, and thou shalt live:
Gen 20:7 ד: and if thou restore [her] not,
Gen 20:7 ה: know thou that thou shalt surely die,
Gen 20:7 ו: thou, and all that [are] thine.
Gen 20:8 א: Therefore Abimelech rose early in the morning,
Gen 20:8 ב: and called all his servants,
Gen 20:8 ג: and told all these things in their ears:
Gen 20:8 ד: and the men were sore afraid.
Gen 20:9 א: Then Abimelech called Abraham, and said unto him,
Gen 20:9 ב: What hast thou done unto us?
Gen 20:9 ג: and what have I offended thee,
Gen 20:9 ד: that thou hast brought on me and on my kingdom a great sin?
Gen 20:9 ה: deeds [...] that ought not to be done.
Gen 20:9 ו: thou hast done [...] unto me
Gen 20:10 א: And Abimelech said unto Abraham,
Gen 20:10 ב: What sawest thou, that thou hast done this thing?
Gen 20:11 א: And Abraham said, Because I thought,
Gen 20:11 ב: Surely the fear of God [is] not in this place;
Gen 20:11 ג: and they will slay me for my wife’s sake.
Gen 20:12 א: And yet indeed [she is] my sister;
Gen 20:12 ב: she [is] the daughter of my father,
Gen 20:12 ג: but not the daughter of my mother;
Gen 20:12 ד: and she became my wife.
Gen 20:13 א: And it came to pass, when God caused me to wander from my father’s house,
Gen 20:13 ב: that I said unto her,
Gen 20:13 ג: This [is] thy kindness which thou shalt shew unto me;
Gen 20:13 ד: at every place whither we shall come,
Gen 20:13 ה: say of me, He [is] my brother.
Gen 20:14 א: And Abimelech took sheep, and oxen, and menservants, and womenservants,
Gen 20:14 ב: and gave [them] unto Abraham,
Gen 20:14 ג: and restored him Sarah his wife.
Gen 20:15 א: And Abimelech said,
Gen 20:15 ב: Behold, my land [is] before thee:
Gen 20:15 ג: dwell where it pleaseth thee.
Gen 20:16 א: And unto Sarah he said,
Gen 20:16 ב: Behold, I have given thy brother a thousand [pieces] of silver:
Gen 20:16 ג: behold, he [is] to thee a covering of the eyes,
Gen 20:16 ד: unto all that [are] with thee, and with all [other]:
Gen 20:16 ה: thus she was reproved.
Gen 20:17 א: So Abraham prayed unto God:
Gen 20:17 ב: and God healed Abimelech,
Gen 20:17 ג: and his wife, and his maidservants; and they bare [children].
Gen 20:18 א: For the LORD had fast closed up
Gen 20:18 ב: all the wombs of the house of Abimelech,
Gen 20:18 ג: because of Sarah Abraham’s wife.
Gen 21:1 א: And the LORD visited Sarah as he had said,
Gen 21:1 ב: and the LORD did unto Sarah as he had spoken.
Gen 21:2 א: For Sarah conceived, and bare Abraham a son in his old age,
Gen 21:2 ב: at the set time of which God had spoken to him.
Gen 21:3 א: And Abraham called the name of his son
Gen 21:3 ב: that was born unto him,
Gen 21:3 ג: whom Sarah bare to him,
Gen 21:3 ד: Isaac.
Gen 21:4 א: And Abraham circumcised his son Isaac
Gen 21:4 ב: being eight days old,
Gen 21:4 ג: as God had commanded him.
Gen 21:5 א: And Abraham was an hundred years old,
Gen 21:5 ב: when his son Isaac was born unto him.
Gen 21:6 א: And Sarah said,
Gen 21:6 ב: God hath made me to laugh,
Gen 21:6 ג: [so that] all that hear will laugh with me.
Gen 21:7 א: And she said,
Gen 21:7 ב: Who would have said unto Abraham,
Gen 21:7 ג: that Sarah should have given children suck?
Gen 21:7 ד: for I have born [him] a son in his old age.
Gen 21:8 א: And the child grew, and was weaned:
Gen 21:8 ב: and Abraham made a great feast
Gen 21:8 ג: the [same] day that Isaac was weaned.
Gen 21:9 א: And Sarah saw the son of Hagar the Egyptian,
Gen 21:9 ב: which she had born unto Abraham,
Gen 21:9 ג: mocking.
Gen 21:10 א: Wherefore she said unto Abraham,
Gen 21:10 ב: Cast out this bondwoman and her son:
Gen 21:10 ג: for the son of this bondwoman shall not be heir
Gen 21:10 ד: with my son,
Gen 21:10 ה: [even] with Isaac.
Gen 21:11 א: And the thing was very grievous in Abraham’s sight
Gen 21:11 ב: because of his son.
Gen 21:12 א: And God said unto Abraham,
Gen 21:12 ב: Let it not be grievous in thy sight because of the lad,
Gen 21:12 ג: and because of thy bondwoman;
Gen 21:12 ד: in all that Sarah hath said unto thee,
Gen 21:12 ה: hearken unto her voice;
Gen 21:12 ו: for in Isaac shall thy seed be called.
Gen 21:13 א: And also of the son of the bondwoman
Gen 21:13 ב: will I make a nation,
Gen 21:13 ג: because he [is] thy seed.
Gen 21:14 א: And Abraham rose up early in the morning,
Gen 21:14 ב: and took bread, and a bottle of water,
Gen 21:14 ג: and gave [it] unto Hagar,
Gen 21:14 ד: putting [it] on her shoulder,
Gen 21:14 ה: and the child,
Gen 21:14 ו: and sent her away: and she departed,
Gen 21:14 ז: and wandered in the wilderness of Beer–sheba.
Gen 21:15 א: And the water was spent in the bottle,
Gen 21:15 ב: and she cast the child under one of the shrubs.
Gen 21:16 א: And she went, and sat her down over against [him] a good way off,
Gen 21:16 ב: as it were a bowshot:
Gen 21:16 ג: for she said,
Gen 21:16 ד: Let me not see the death of the child.
Gen 21:16 ה: And she sat over against [him],
Gen 21:16 ו: and lift up her voice,
Gen 21:16 ז: and wept.
Gen 21:17 א: And God heard the voice of the lad;
Gen 21:17 ב: and the angel of God called to Hagar out of heaven,
Gen 21:17 ג: and said unto her,
Gen 21:17 ד: What aileth thee, Hagar?
Gen 21:17 ה: fear not;
Gen 21:17 ו: for God hath heard the voice of the lad
Gen 21:17 ז: where he [is].
Gen 21:18 א: Arise, lift up the lad,
Gen 21:18 ב: and hold him in thine hand;
Gen 21:18 ג: for I will make him a great nation.
Gen 21:19 א: And God opened her eyes,
Gen 21:19 ב: and she saw a well of water;
Gen 21:19 ג: and she went, and filled the bottle with water,
Gen 21:19 ד: and gave the lad drink.
Gen 21:20 א: And God was with the lad;
Gen 21:20 ב: and he grew, and dwelt in the wilderness,
Gen 21:20 ג: and became an archer.
Gen 21:21 א: And he dwelt in the wilderness of Paran:
Gen 21:21 ב: and his mother took him
Gen 21:21 ג: a wife out of the land of Egypt.
Gen 21:22 א: And it came to pass at that time,
Gen 21:22 ב: that Abimelech and Phichol the chief captain of his host spake
Gen 21:22 ג: unto Abraham, saying,
Gen 21:22 ד: God [is] with thee in all that thou doest:
Gen 21:23 א: Now therefore swear unto me here by God
Gen 21:23 ב: that thou wilt not deal falsely with me,
Gen 21:23 ג: nor with my son, nor with my son’s son:
Gen 21:23 ד: [but] according to the kindness that I have done unto thee,
Gen 21:23 ה: thou shalt do unto me,
Gen 21:23 ו: and to the land wherein thou hast sojourned.
Gen 21:24 א: And Abraham said, I will swear.
Gen 21:25 א: And Abraham reproved Abimelech
Gen 21:25 ב: because of a well of water,
Gen 21:25 ג: which Abimelech’s servants had violently taken away.
Gen 21:26 א: And Abimelech said,
Gen 21:26 ב: I wot not who hath done this thing:
Gen 21:26 ג: neither didst thou tell me,
Gen 21:26 ד: neither yet heard I [of it], but to day.
Gen 21:27 א: And Abraham took sheep and oxen,
Gen 21:27 ב: and gave them unto Abimelech;
Gen 21:27 ג: and both of them made a covenant.
Gen 21:28 א: And Abraham set
Gen 21:28 ב: seven ewe lambs of the flock by themselves.
Gen 21:29 א: And Abimelech said unto Abraham,
Gen 21:29 ב: What [mean] these seven ewe lambs
Gen 21:29 ג: which thou hast set by themselves?
Gen 21:30 א: And he said,
Gen 21:30 ב: For [these] seven ewe lambs shalt thou take of my hand,
Gen 21:30 ג: that they may be a witness unto me,
Gen 21:30 ד: that I have digged this well.
Gen 21:31 א: Wherefore he called that place Beer–sheba;
Gen 21:31 ב: because there they sware both of them.
Gen 21:32 א: Thus they made a covenant at Beer–sheba:
Gen 21:32 ב: then Abimelech rose up, and Phichol the chief captain of his host,
Gen 21:32 ג: and they returned into the land of the Philistines.
Gen 21:33 א: And [Abraham] planted a grove in Beer–sheba,
Gen 21:33 ב: and called there on the name of the LORD,
Gen 21:33 ג: the everlasting God.
Gen 21:34 א: And Abraham sojourned in the Philistines’ land many days.
Gen 22:1 א: And it came to pass after these things,
Gen 22:1 ב: that God did tempt Abraham,
Gen 22:1 ג: and said unto him,
Gen 22:1 ד: Abraham:
Gen 22:1 ה: and he said,
Gen 22:1 ו: Behold, [here] I [am].
Gen 22:2 א: And he said,
Gen 22:2 ב: Take now thy son,
Gen 22:2 ג: thine only [son] Isaac, whom thou lovest,
Gen 22:2 ד: and get thee into the land of Moriah;
Gen 22:2 ה: and offer him there for a burnt offering
Gen 22:2 ו: upon one of the mountains which I will tell thee of.
Gen 22:3 א: And Abraham rose up early in the morning,
Gen 22:3 ב: and saddled his ass,
Gen 22:3 ג: and took two of his young men with him,
Gen 22:3 ד: and Isaac his son,
Gen 22:3 ה: and clave the wood for the burnt offering,
Gen 22:3 ו: and rose up, and went unto the place
Gen 22:3 ז: of which God had told him.
Gen 22:4 א: on the third day
Gen 22:4 ב: Then [...] Abraham lifted up his eyes,
Gen 22:4 ג: and saw the place afar off.
Gen 22:5 א: And Abraham said unto his young men,
Gen 22:5 ב: Abide ye here with the ass;
Gen 22:5 ג: and I and the lad
Gen 22:5 ד: will go yonder and worship,
Gen 22:5 ה: and come again to you.
Gen 22:6 א: And Abraham took the wood of the burnt offering,
Gen 22:6 ב: and laid [it] upon Isaac his son;
Gen 22:6 ג: and he took the fire in his hand, and a knife;
Gen 22:6 ד: and they went both of them together.
Gen 22:7 א: And Isaac spake unto Abraham his father, and said,
Gen 22:7 ב: My father:
Gen 22:7 ג: and he said,
Gen 22:7 ד: Here [am] I, my son.
Gen 22:7 ה: And he said,
Gen 22:7 ו: Behold the fire and the wood:
Gen 22:7 ז: but where [is] the lamb for a burnt offering?
Gen 22:8 א: And Abraham said,
Gen 22:8 ב: My son, God will provide himself a lamb for a burnt offering:
Gen 22:8 ג: so they went both of them together.
Gen 22:9 א: And they came to the place which God had told him of;
Gen 22:9 ב: and Abraham built an altar there,
Gen 22:9 ג: and laid the wood in order,
Gen 22:9 ד: and bound Isaac his son,
Gen 22:9 ה: and laid him on the altar upon the wood.
Gen 22:10 א: And Abraham stretched forth his hand,
Gen 22:10 ב: and took the knife to slay his son.
Gen 22:11 א: And the angel of the LORD called unto him out of heaven,
Gen 22:11 ב: and said, Abraham, Abraham:
Gen 22:11 ג: and he said, Here [am] I.
Gen 22:12 א: And he said, Lay not thine hand upon the lad,
Gen 22:12 ב: neither do thou any thing unto him:
Gen 22:12 ג: for now I know that thou fearest God,
Gen 22:12 ד: seeing thou hast not withheld thy son,
Gen 22:12 ה: thine only [son]
Gen 22:12 ו: from me.
Gen 22:13 א: And Abraham lifted up his eyes,
Gen 22:13 ב: and looked, and behold behind [him] a ram caught in a thicket by his horns:
Gen 22:13 ג: and Abraham went and took the ram,
Gen 22:13 ד: and offered him up for a burnt offering in the stead of his son.
Gen 22:14 א: And Abraham called the name of that place Jehovah–jireh:
Gen 22:14 ב: as it is said [to] this day,
Gen 22:14 ג: In the mount of the LORD it shall be seen.
Gen 22:15 א: And the angel of the LORD called unto Abraham out of heaven the second time,
Gen 22:16 א: And said, By myself have I sworn,
Gen 22:16 ב: saith the LORD,
Gen 22:16 ג: for because thou hast done this thing,
Gen 22:16 ד: and hast not withheld thy son,
Gen 22:16 ה: thine only [son]:
Gen 22:17 א: That in blessing I will bless thee,
Gen 22:17 ב: and in multiplying I will multiply thy seed
Gen 22:17 ג: as the stars of the heaven,
Gen 22:17 ד: and as the sand which [is] upon the sea shore;
Gen 22:17 ה: and thy seed shall possess the gate of his enemies;
Gen 22:18 א: And in thy seed shall all the nations of the earth be blessed;
Gen 22:18 ב: because thou hast obeyed my voice.
Gen 22:19 א: So Abraham returned unto his young men,
Gen 22:19 ב: and they rose up and went together to Beer–sheba;
Gen 22:19 ג: and Abraham dwelt at Beer–sheba.
Gen 22:20 א: And it came to pass after these things,
Gen 22:20 ב: that it was told Abraham, saying,
Gen 22:20 ג: Behold, Milcah, she hath also born
Gen 22:20 ד: children unto thy brother Nahor;
Gen 22:21 א: Huz his firstborn,
Gen 22:21 ב: and Buz his brother,
Gen 22:21 ג: and Kemuel the father of Aram,
Gen 22:22 א: And Chesed, and Hazo,
Gen 22:22 ב: and Pildash, and Jidlaph,
Gen 22:22 ג: and Bethuel.
Gen 22:23 א: And Bethuel begat Rebekah:
Gen 22:23 ב: these eight Milcah did bear
Gen 22:23 ג: to Nahor, Abraham’s brother.
Gen 22:24 א: And his concubine, whose name [was] Reumah,
Gen 22:24 ב: she bare also Tebah,
Gen 22:24 ג: and Gaham, and Thahash, and Maachah.
Gen 23:1 א: And Sarah was an hundred and seven and twenty years old:
Gen 23:1 ב: [these were] the years of the life of Sarah.
Gen 23:2 א: And Sarah died in Kirjath–arba;
Gen 23:2 ב: the same [is] Hebron in the land of Canaan:
Gen 23:2 ג: and Abraham came to mourn for Sarah,
Gen 23:2 ד: and to weep for her.
Gen 23:3 א: And Abraham stood up from before his dead,
Gen 23:3 ב: and spake unto the sons of Heth, saying,
Gen 23:4 א: I [am] a stranger and a sojourner with you:
Gen 23:4 ב: give me a possession of a buryingplace with you,
Gen 23:4 ג: that I may bury my dead out of my sight.
Gen 23:5 א: And the children of Heth answered Abraham,
Gen 23:5 ב: saying unto him,
Gen 23:6 א: Hear us, my lord:
Gen 23:6 ב: thou [art] a mighty prince among us:
Gen 23:6 ג: in the choice of our sepulchres
Gen 23:6 ד: bury thy dead;
Gen 23:6 ה: none of us shall withhold from thee his sepulchre,
Gen 23:6 ו: but that thou mayest bury thy dead.
Gen 23:7 א: And Abraham stood up,
Gen 23:7 ב: and bowed himself to the people of the land,
Gen 23:7 ג: [even] to the children of Heth.
Gen 23:8 א: And he communed with them, saying,
Gen 23:8 ב: If it be your mind
Gen 23:8 ג: that I should bury my dead out of my sight;
Gen 23:8 ד: hear me,
Gen 23:8 ה: and intreat for me to Ephron the son of Zohar,
Gen 23:9 א: That he may give me the cave of Machpelah, which he hath,
Gen 23:9 ב: which [is] in the end of his field;
Gen 23:9 ג: for as much money as it is worth he shall give it me

gist: as much as it is worth

kjv: Gen 23:9 ד: for a possession of a buryingplace amongst you.
Gen 23:10 א: And Ephron dwelt among the children of Heth:
Gen 23:10 ב: and Ephron the Hittite answered Abraham
Gen 23:10 ג: in the audience of the children of Heth,
Gen 23:10 ד: [even] of all that went in at the gate of his city,
Gen 23:10 ה: saying,
Gen 23:11 א: Nay, my lord, hear me:
Gen 23:11 ב: the field give I thee,
Gen 23:11 ג: and the cave that [is] therein, I give it thee;
Gen 23:11 ד: in the presence of the sons of my people give I it thee:
Gen 23:11 ה: bury thy dead.
Gen 23:12 א: And Abraham bowed down himself
Gen 23:12 ב: before the people of the land.
Gen 23:13 א: And he spake unto Ephron in the audience of the people of the land, saying,
Gen 23:13 ב: But if thou [wilt give it], [...] pray thee, hear me:
Gen 23:13 ג: I [...] I will give thee money for the field;
Gen 23:13 ד: take [it] of me,
Gen 23:13 ה: and I will bury my dead there.
Gen 23:14 א: And Ephron answered Abraham,
Gen 23:14 ב: saying unto him,
Gen 23:15 א: My lord, hearken unto me:
Gen 23:15 ב: the land [is worth] four hundred shekels of silver;
Gen 23:15 ג: what [is] that betwixt me and thee?
Gen 23:15 ד: bury therefore thy dead.
Gen 23:16 א: And Abraham hearkened unto Ephron;
Gen 23:16 ב: and Abraham weighed to Ephron the silver, which he had named
Gen 23:16 ג: in the audience of the sons of Heth,
Gen 23:16 ד: four hundred shekels of silver,
Gen 23:16 ה: current [money] with the merchant.
Gen 23:17 א: And the field of Ephron, which [was] in Machpelah, [...] were made sure
Gen 23:17 ב: which [was] before Mamre,
Gen 23:17 ג: the field, and the cave which [was] therein,
Gen 23:17 ד: and all the trees that [were] in the field,
Gen 23:17 ה: that [were] in all the borders round about,
Gen 23:18 א: Unto Abraham for a possession in the presence of the children of Heth,
Gen 23:18 ב: before all that went in at the gate of his city.
Gen 23:19 א: And after this, Abraham buried Sarah his wife
Gen 23:19 ב: in the cave of the field of Machpelah
Gen 23:19 ג: before Mamre:
Gen 23:19 ד: the same [is] Hebron in the land of Canaan.
Gen 23:20 א: And [...] were made sure
Gen 23:20 ב: the field, and the cave that [is] therein,
Gen 23:20 ג: unto Abraham for a possession of a buryingplace
Gen 23:20 ד: by the sons of Heth.
Gen 24:1 א: And Abraham was old,
Gen 24:1 ב: [and] well stricken in age:
Gen 24:1 ג: and the LORD had blessed Abraham in all things.
Gen 24:2 א: And Abraham said unto his [...] servant
Gen 24:2 ב: eldest [...] of his house,
Gen 24:2 ג: that ruled over all that he had,
Gen 24:2 ד: Put, I pray thee, thy hand under my thigh:
Gen 24:3 א: And I will make thee swear by the LORD,
Gen 24:3 ב: the God of heaven, and the God of the earth,
Gen 24:3 ג: that thou shalt not take a wife unto my son of the daughters of the Canaanites,
Gen 24:3 ד: among whom I dwell:
Gen 24:4 א: But thou shalt go unto my country, and to my kindred,
Gen 24:4 ב: and take a wife unto my son Isaac.
Gen 24:5 א: And the servant said unto him,
Gen 24:5 ב: Peradventure the woman will not be willing
Gen 24:5 ג: to follow me unto this land:
Gen 24:5 ד: must I needs bring thy son again
Gen 24:5 ה: unto the land from whence thou camest?
Gen 24:6 א: And Abraham said unto him,
Gen 24:6 ב: Beware thou that thou bring not my son thither again.
Gen 24:7 א: The LORD God of heaven,
Gen 24:7 ב: which took me from my father’s house,
Gen 24:7 ג: and from the land of my kindred,
Gen 24:7 ד: and which spake unto me,
Gen 24:7 ה: and that sware unto me, saying,
Gen 24:7 ו: Unto thy seed will I give this land;
Gen 24:7 ז: he shall send his angel before thee,
Gen 24:7 ח: and thou shalt take a wife unto my son from thence.
Gen 24:8 א: And if the woman will not be willing to follow thee,
Gen 24:8 ב: then thou shalt be clear from this my oath:
Gen 24:8 ג: only bring not my son thither again.
Gen 24:9 א: And the servant put his hand under the thigh of Abraham his master,
Gen 24:9 ב: and sware to him concerning that matter.
Gen 24:10 א: And the servant took ten camels of the camels of his master,
Gen 24:10 ב: and departed;
Gen 24:10 ג: for all the goods of his master [were] in his hand:
Gen 24:10 ד: and he arose, and went to Mesopotamia,
Gen 24:10 ה: unto the city of Nahor.
Gen 24:11 א: And he made his camels to kneel down without the city
Gen 24:11 ב: by a well of water at the time of the evening,
Gen 24:11 ג: [even] the time that women go out to draw [water].
Gen 24:12 א: And he said, O LORD
Gen 24:12 ב: God of my master Abraham,
Gen 24:12 ג: I pray thee, send me good speed this day,
Gen 24:12 ד: and shew kindness unto my master Abraham.
Gen 24:13 א: Behold, I stand [here] by the well of water;
Gen 24:13 ב: and the daughters of the men of the city come out to draw water:
Gen 24:14 א: And let it come to pass, that the damsel to whom I shall say,
Gen 24:14 ב: Let down thy pitcher, I pray thee, that I may drink;
Gen 24:14 ג: and she shall say, Drink,
Gen 24:14 ד: and I will give thy camels drink also:
Gen 24:14 ה: [let the same be] she [that] thou hast appointed for thy servant Isaac;
Gen 24:14 ו: and thereby shall I know that thou hast shewed kindness unto my master.
Gen 24:15 א: And it came to pass, before he had done speaking, that, behold,
Gen 24:15 ב: Rebekah came out, who was born to Bethuel,
Gen 24:15 ג: son of Milcah, the wife of Nahor, Abraham’s brother,
Gen 24:15 ד: with her pitcher upon her shoulder.
Gen 24:16 א: And the damsel [was] very fair to look upon,
Gen 24:16 ב: a virgin,
Gen 24:16 ג: neither had any man known her:
Gen 24:16 ד: and she went down to the well,
Gen 24:16 ה: and filled her pitcher, and came up.
Gen 24:17 א: And the servant ran to meet her, and said,
Gen 24:17 ב: Let me, I pray thee, drink a little water of thy pitcher.
Gen 24:18 א: And she said, Drink, my lord:
Gen 24:18 ב: and she hasted, and let down her pitcher upon her hand,
Gen 24:18 ג: and gave him drink.
Gen 24:19 א: And when she had done giving him drink, she said,
Gen 24:19 ב: I will draw [water] for thy camels also,
Gen 24:19 ג: until they have done drinking.
Gen 24:20 א: And she hasted, and emptied her pitcher into the trough,
Gen 24:20 ב: and ran again unto the well to draw [water],
Gen 24:20 ג: and drew for all his camels.
Gen 24:21 א: And the man wondering at her held his peace,
Gen 24:21 ב: to wit
Gen 24:21 ג: whether the LORD had made his journey prosperous or not.
Gen 24:22 א: And it came to pass, as the camels had done drinking,
Gen 24:22 ב: that the man took a golden earring
Gen 24:22 ג: of half a shekel weight,
Gen 24:22 ד: and two bracelets for her hands
Gen 24:22 ה: of ten [shekels] weight of gold;
Gen 24:23 א: And said, Whose daughter [art] thou?
Gen 24:23 ב: tell me, I pray thee:
Gen 24:23 ג: is there room [in] thy father’s house for us to lodge in?
Gen 24:24 א: And she said unto him, I [am] the daughter of Bethuel
Gen 24:24 ב: the son of Milcah, which she bare unto Nahor.
Gen 24:25 א: She said moreover unto him,
Gen 24:25 ב: We have both straw and provender enough,
Gen 24:25 ג: and room to lodge in.
Gen 24:26 א: And the man bowed down his head,
Gen 24:26 ב: and worshipped the LORD.
Gen 24:27 א: And he said, Blessed [be] the LORD
Gen 24:27 ב: God of my master Abraham,
Gen 24:27 ג: who hath not left destitute my master of his mercy and his truth:
Gen 24:27 ד: I [being] in the way, the LORD led me
Gen 24:27 ה: to the house of my master’s brethren.
Gen 24:28 א: And the damsel ran,
Gen 24:28 ב: and told [them of] her mother’s house
Gen 24:28 ג: these things.
Gen 24:29 א: And Rebekah had a brother, and his name [was] Laban:
Gen 24:29 ב: and Laban ran out unto the man,
Gen 24:29 ג: unto the well.
Gen 24:30 א: And it came to pass, when he saw the earring
Gen 24:30 ב: and bracelets upon his sister’s hands,
Gen 24:30 ג: and when he heard the words of Rebekah his sister, saying,
Gen 24:30 ד: Thus spake the man unto me;
Gen 24:30 ה: that he came unto the man;
Gen 24:30 ו: and, behold, he stood by the camels at the well.
Gen 24:31 א: And he said, Come in, thou blessed of the LORD;
Gen 24:31 ב: wherefore standest thou without?
Gen 24:31 ג: for I have prepared the house, and room for the camels.
Gen 24:32 א: And the man came into the house:
Gen 24:32 ב: and he ungirded his camels,
Gen 24:32 ג: and gave straw and provender for the camels,
Gen 24:32 ד: and water to wash his feet,
Gen 24:32 ה: and the men’s feet that [were] with him.
Gen 24:33 א: And there was set [meat] before him to eat: but he said,
Gen 24:33 ב: I will not eat, until I have told mine errand.
Gen 24:33 ג: And he said, Speak on.
Gen 24:34 א: And he said, I [am] Abraham’s servant.
Gen 24:35 א: And the LORD hath blessed my master greatly;
Gen 24:35 ב: and he is become great:
Gen 24:35 ג: and he hath given him flocks, and herds,
Gen 24:35 ד: and silver, and gold,
Gen 24:35 ה: and menservants, and maidservants,
Gen 24:35 ו: and camels, and asses.
Gen 24:36 א: And Sarah my master’s wife bare a son to my master
Gen 24:36 ב: when she was old:
Gen 24:36 ג: and unto him hath he given all that he hath.
Gen 24:37 א: And my master made me swear, saying,
Gen 24:37 ב: Thou shalt not take a wife to my son of the daughters of the Canaanites,
Gen 24:37 ג: in whose land I dwell:
Gen 24:38 א: But thou shalt go unto my father’s house,
Gen 24:38 ב: and to my kindred,
Gen 24:38 ג: and take a wife unto my son.
Gen 24:39 א: And I said unto my master,
Gen 24:39 ב: Peradventure the woman will not follow me.
Gen 24:40 א: And he said unto me,
Gen 24:40 ב: The LORD, before whom I walk,
Gen 24:40 ג: will send his angel with thee, and prosper thy way;
Gen 24:40 ד: and thou shalt take a wife for my son of my kindred,
Gen 24:40 ה: and of my father’s house:
Gen 24:41 א: Then shalt thou be clear from [this] my oath,
Gen 24:41 ב: when thou comest to my kindred;
Gen 24:41 ג: and if they give not thee [one],
Gen 24:41 ד: thou shalt be clear from my oath.
Gen 24:42 א: And I came this day unto the well,
Gen 24:42 ב: and said, O LORD
Gen 24:42 ג: God of my master Abraham,
Gen 24:42 ד: if now thou do prosper my way
Gen 24:42 ה: which I go:
Gen 24:43 א: Behold,
Gen 24:43 ב: I stand by the well of water;
Gen 24:43 ג: and it shall come to pass, that when the virgin cometh forth to draw [water],
Gen 24:43 ד: and I say to her,
Gen 24:43 ה: Give me, I pray thee, a little water of thy pitcher to drink;
Gen 24:44 א: And she say to me,
Gen 24:44 ב: Both drink thou,
Gen 24:44 ג: and I will also draw for thy camels:
Gen 24:44 ד: [let] the same [be] the woman whom the LORD hath appointed out for my master’s son.
Gen 24:45 א: And before I had done speaking in mine heart,
Gen 24:45 ב: behold, Rebekah came forth
Gen 24:45 ג: with her pitcher on her shoulder;
Gen 24:45 ד: and she went down unto the well, and drew [water]:
Gen 24:45 ה: and I said unto her,
Gen 24:45 ו: Let me drink, I pray thee.
Gen 24:46 א: And she made haste,
Gen 24:46 ב: and let down her pitcher from her [shoulder], and said,
Gen 24:46 ג: Drink, and I will give thy camels drink also:
Gen 24:46 ד: so I drank, and she made the camels drink also.
Gen 24:47 א: And I asked her, and said,
Gen 24:47 ב: Whose daughter [art] thou?
Gen 24:47 ג: And she said, The daughter of Bethuel,
Gen 24:47 ד: Nahor’s son,
Gen 24:47 ה: whom Milcah bare unto him:
Gen 24:47 ו: and I put the earring upon her face,
Gen 24:47 ז: and the bracelets upon her hands.
Gen 24:48 א: And I bowed down my head, and worshipped the LORD,
Gen 24:48 ב: and blessed the LORD
Gen 24:48 ג: God of my master Abraham,
Gen 24:48 ד: which had led me in the right way
Gen 24:48 ה: to take my master’s brother’s daughter unto his son.
Gen 24:49 א: And now
Gen 24:49 ב: if ye will deal kindly and truly with my master,
Gen 24:49 ג: tell me:
Gen 24:49 ד: and if not, tell me;
Gen 24:49 ה: that I may turn to the right hand, or to the left.
Gen 24:50 א: Then Laban and Bethuel answered and said,
Gen 24:50 ב: The thing proceedeth from the LORD:
Gen 24:50 ג: we cannot speak unto thee bad or good.
Gen 24:51 א: Behold, Rebekah [is] before thee,
Gen 24:51 ב: take [her], and go,
Gen 24:51 ג: and let her be thy master’s son’s wife,
Gen 24:51 ד: as the LORD hath spoken.
Gen 24:52 א: And it came to pass, that, when Abraham’s servant heard their words,
Gen 24:52 ב: he worshipped the LORD, [bowing himself] to the earth.
Gen 24:53 א: And the servant brought forth jewels of silver,
Gen 24:53 ב: and jewels of gold,
Gen 24:53 ג: and raiment,
Gen 24:53 ד: and gave [them] to Rebekah:
Gen 24:53 ה: he gave also to her brother and to her mother precious things.
Gen 24:54 א: And they did eat and drink,
Gen 24:54 ב: he and the men that [were] with him,
Gen 24:54 ג: and tarried all night; and they rose up in the morning, and he said,
Gen 24:54 ד: Send me away unto my master.
Gen 24:55 א: And her brother and her mother said,
Gen 24:55 ב: Let the damsel abide with us [a few] days,
Gen 24:55 ג: at the least ten; after that she shall go.
Gen 24:56 א: And he said unto them, Hinder me not,
Gen 24:56 ב: seeing the LORD hath prospered my way;
Gen 24:56 ג: send me away that I may go to my master.
Gen 24:57 א: And they said,
Gen 24:57 ב: We will call the damsel,
Gen 24:57 ג: and inquire at her mouth.
Gen 24:58 א: And they called Rebekah, and said unto her,
Gen 24:58 ב: Wilt thou go with this man?
Gen 24:58 ג: And she said, I will go.
Gen 24:59 א: And they sent away Rebekah their sister,
Gen 24:59 ב: and her nurse,
Gen 24:59 ג: and Abraham’s servant,
Gen 24:59 ד: and his men.
Gen 24:60 א: And they blessed Rebekah, and said unto her,
Gen 24:60 ב: Thou [art] our sister,
Gen 24:60 ג: be thou [the mother] of thousands of millions,
Gen 24:60 ד: and let thy seed possess the gate of those which hate them.
Gen 24:61 א: And Rebekah arose, and her damsels,
Gen 24:61 ב: and they rode upon the camels,
Gen 24:61 ג: and followed the man:
Gen 24:61 ד: and the servant took Rebekah,
Gen 24:61 ה: and went his way.
Gen 24:62 א: And Isaac came from the way of the well Lahai–roi;

kjgv: [בְּאֵר לְחַי רֹאִי]|[beer lechai roi]|[Beer] (well) [Lahai] (to life) [Roi] (seeing me)

kjv: Gen 24:62 ב: for he dwelt in the south country.
Gen 24:63 א: And Isaac went out to meditate in the field at the eventide:
Gen 24:63 ב: and he lifted up his eyes,
Gen 24:63 ג: and saw, and, behold, the camels [were] coming.
Gen 24:64 א: And Rebekah lifted up her eyes,
Gen 24:64 ב: and when she saw Isaac,
Gen 24:64 ג: she lighted off the camel.
Gen 24:65 א: For she [had] said unto the servant,
Gen 24:65 ב: What man [is] this that walketh in the field to meet us?
Gen 24:65 ג: And the servant [had] said,
Gen 24:65 ד: It [is] my master:
Gen 24:65 ה: therefore she took a vail, and covered herself.
Gen 24:66 א: And the servant told Isaac
Gen 24:66 ב: all things that he had done.
Gen 24:67 א: And Isaac brought her into his mother Sarah’s tent,
Gen 24:67 ב: and took Rebekah,
Gen 24:67 ג: and she became his wife; and he loved her:
Gen 24:67 ד: and Isaac was comforted after his mother’s [death].
Gen 25:1 א: Then again Abraham
Gen 25:1 ב: took a wife,
Gen 25:1 ג: and her name [was] Keturah.
Gen 25:2 א: And she bare him Zimran,
Gen 25:2 ב: and Jokshan,
Gen 25:2 ג: and Medan,
Gen 25:2 ד: and Midian,
Gen 25:2 ה: and Ishbak,
Gen 25:2 ו: and Shuah.
Gen 25:3 א: And Jokshan begat Sheba, and Dedan.
Gen 25:3 ב: And the sons of Dedan were
Gen 25:3 ג: Asshurim, and Letushim, and Leummim.
Gen 25:4 א: And the sons of Midian;
Gen 25:4 ב: Ephah, and Epher, and Hanoch, and Abida, and Eldaah.
Gen 25:4 ג: All these [were] the children of Keturah.
Gen 25:5 א: And Abraham gave all that he had unto Isaac.
Gen 25:6 א: But unto the sons of the concubines, which Abraham had,
Gen 25:6 ב: Abraham gave gifts,
Gen 25:6 ג: and sent them away from Isaac his son,
Gen 25:6 ד: while he yet lived, eastward,
Gen 25:6 ה: unto the east country.
Gen 25:7 א: And these [are] the days of the years of Abraham’s life which he lived,
Gen 25:7 ב: an hundred threescore and fifteen years.
Gen 25:8 א: Then Abraham gave up the ghost, and died in a good old age,
Gen 25:8 ב: an old man, and full [of years];
Gen 25:8 ג: and was gathered to his people.
Gen 25:9 א: And his sons Isaac and Ishmael buried him
Gen 25:9 ב: in the cave of Machpelah,
Gen 25:9 ג: in the field of Ephron
Gen 25:9 ד: the son of Zohar the Hittite,
Gen 25:9 ה: which [is] before Mamre;
Gen 25:10 א: The field which Abraham purchased
Gen 25:10 ב: of the sons of Heth:
Gen 25:10 ג: there was Abraham buried,
Gen 25:10 ד: and Sarah his wife.
Gen 25:11 א: And it came to pass after the death of Abraham,
Gen 25:11 ב: that God blessed his son Isaac;
Gen 25:11 ג: and Isaac dwelt by the well Lahai–roi.
