Job 17:4 ב: therefore shalt thou not exalt [them].
Job 17:5 א: He that speaketh flattery to [his] friends,
Job 17:5 ב: even the eyes of his children shall fail.
Job 17:6 א: He hath made me also a byword of the people;
Job 17:6 ב: and aforetime I was as a tabret.
Job 17:7 א: Mine eye also is dim by reason of sorrow,
Job 17:7 ב: and all my members [are] as a shadow.
Job 17:8 א: Upright [men] shall be astonied at this,
Job 17:8 ב: and the innocent shall stir up himself against the hypocrite.
Job 17:9 א: The righteous also shall hold on his way,
Job 17:9 ב: and he that hath clean hands shall be stronger and stronger.
Job 17:10 א: But as for you all, do ye return,
Job 17:10 ב: and come now:
Job 17:10 ג: for I cannot find [one] wise [man] among you.
Job 17:11 א: My days are past, my purposes
Job 17:11 ב: are broken off, [even] the thoughts of my heart.
Job 17:12 א: They change the night into day:
Job 17:12 ב: the light [is] short because of darkness.
Job 17:13 א: If I wait,
Job 17:13 ב: the grave [is] mine house:
Job 17:13 ג: I have made my bed in the darkness.
Job 17:14 א: I have said to corruption, Thou [art] my father:
Job 17:14 ב: to the worm, [Thou art] my mother, and my sister.
Job 17:15 א: And where [is] now my hope?
Job 17:15 ב: as for my hope, who shall see it?
Job 17:16 א: They shall go down to the bars of the pit,
Job 17:16 ב: when [our] rest together [is] in the dust.
Job 18:1 א: Then answered Bildad the Shuhite, and said,
Job 18:2 א: How long [will it be ere] ye make an end of words?
Job 18:2 ב: mark,
Job 18:2 ג: and afterwards we will speak.
Job 18:3 א: Wherefore are we counted as beasts,
Job 18:3 ב: [and] reputed vile in your sight?
Job 18:4 א: He teareth himself in his anger:
Job 18:4 ב: shall the earth be forsaken for thee?
Job 18:4 ג: and shall the rock be removed out of his place?
Job 18:5 א: Yea, the light of the wicked shall be put out,
Job 18:5 ב: and the spark of his fire shall not shine.
Job 18:6 א: The light shall be dark in his tabernacle,
Job 18:6 ב: and his candle shall be put out with him.
Job 18:7 א: The steps of his strength shall be straitened,
Job 18:7 ב: and his own counsel shall cast him down.
Job 18:8 א: For he is cast into a net by his own feet,
Job 18:8 ב: and he walketh upon a snare.
Job 18:9 א: The gin shall take [him] by the heel,
Job 18:9 ב: [and] the robber shall prevail against him.
Job 18:10 א: The snare [is] laid for him in the ground,
Job 18:10 ב: and a trap for him in the way.
Job 18:11 א: Terrors shall make him afraid on every side,
Job 18:11 ב: and shall drive him to his feet.
Job 18:12 א: His strength shall be hungerbitten,
Job 18:12 ב: and destruction [shall be] ready at his side.
Job 18:13 א: It shall devour the strength of his skin:
Job 18:13 ב: [even] the firstborn of death shall devour his strength.
Job 18:14 א: His confidence shall be rooted out of his tabernacle,
Job 18:14 ב: and it shall bring him to the king of terrors.
Job 18:15 א: It shall dwell in his tabernacle, because [it is] none of his:
Job 18:15 ב: brimstone shall be scattered upon his habitation.
Job 18:16 א: His roots shall be dried up beneath,
Job 18:16 ב: and above shall his branch be cut off.
Job 18:17 א: His remembrance shall perish from the earth,
Job 18:17 ב: and he shall have no name in the street.
Job 18:18 א: He shall be driven from light into darkness,
Job 18:18 ב: and chased out of the world.
Job 18:19 א: He shall neither have son
Job 18:19 ב: nor nephew among his people,
Job 18:19 ג: nor any remaining in his dwellings.
Job 18:20 א: They that come after [him] shall be astonied at his day,
Job 18:20 ב: as they that went before were affrighted.
Job 18:21 א: Surely such [are] the dwellings of the wicked,
Job 18:21 ב: and this [is] the place [of him that] knoweth not God.
Job 19:1 א: Then Job answered and said,
Job 19:2 א: How long will ye vex my soul,
Job 19:2 ב: and break me in pieces with words?
Job 19:3 א: These ten times have ye reproached me:
Job 19:3 ב: ye are not ashamed [that] ye make yourselves strange to me.
Job 19:4 א: And be it indeed [that] I have erred,
Job 19:4 ב: mine error remaineth with myself.
Job 19:5 א: If indeed ye will magnify [yourselves] against me,
Job 19:5 ב: and plead against me my reproach:
Job 19:6 א: Know now that God hath overthrown me,
Job 19:6 ב: and hath compassed me with his net.
Job 19:7 א: Behold, I cry out of wrong,
Job 19:7 ב: but I am not heard:
Job 19:7 ג: I cry aloud,
Job 19:7 ד: but [there is] no judgment.
Job 19:8 א: He hath fenced up my way that I cannot pass,
Job 19:8 ב: and he hath set darkness in my paths.
Job 19:9 א: He hath stripped me of my glory,
Job 19:9 ב: and taken the crown [from] my head.
Job 19:10 א: He hath destroyed me on every side, and I am gone:
Job 19:10 ב: and mine hope hath he removed like a tree.
Job 19:11 א: He hath also kindled his wrath against me,
Job 19:11 ב: and he counteth me unto him as [one of] his enemies.
Job 19:12 א: His troops come together,
Job 19:12 ב: and raise up their way against me,
Job 19:12 ג: and encamp round about my tabernacle.
Job 19:13 א: He hath put my brethren far [...] from me.
Job 19:13 ב: from me, and mine acquaintance are verily estranged
Job 19:14 א: My kinsfolk have failed,
Job 19:14 ב: and my familiar friends have forgotten me.
Job 19:15 א: They that dwell in mine house, and my maids,
Job 19:15 ב: count me for a stranger:
Job 19:15 ג: I am an alien in their sight.
Job 19:16 א: I called my servant, and he gave [me] no answer;
Job 19:16 ב: I intreated him with my mouth.
Job 19:17 א: My breath is strange to my wife,
Job 19:17 ב: though I intreated for the children’s [sake] of mine own body.
Job 19:18 א: Yea, young children despised me;
Job 19:18 ב: I arose, and they spake against me.
Job 19:19 א: All my inward friends abhorred me:
Job 19:19 ב: and they whom I loved are turned against me.
Job 19:20 א: My bone cleaveth to my skin and to my flesh,
Job 19:20 ב: and I am escaped with the skin of my teeth.
Job 19:21 א: Have pity upon me, have pity upon me,
Job 19:21 ב: O ye my friends;
Job 19:21 ג: for the hand of God hath touched me.
Job 19:22 א: Why do ye persecute me as God,
Job 19:22 ב: and are not satisfied with my flesh?
Job 19:23 א: Oh that my words were now written!
Job 19:23 ב: oh that they were printed in a book!
Job 19:24 א: with an iron pen and lead
Job 19:24 ב: That they were graven [...] in the rock for ever!
Job 19:25 א: For I know [that] my redeemer liveth,
Job 19:25 ב: and [that] he shall stand at the latter [day] upon the earth:
Job 19:26 א: And [though] after my skin [worms] destroy this [body],
Job 19:26 ב: yet in my flesh shall I see God:
Job 19:27 א: Whom I shall see for myself,
Job 19:27 ב: and mine eyes shall behold, and not another;
Job 19:27 ג: [though] my reins be consumed within me.
Job 19:28 א: But ye should say,
Job 19:28 ב: Why persecute we him,
Job 19:28 ג: seeing the root of the matter is found in me?
Job 19:29 א: Be ye afraid of the sword:
Job 19:29 ב: for wrath [bringeth] the punishments of the sword,
Job 19:29 ג: that ye may know [there is] a judgment.
Job 20:1 א: Then answered Zophar the Naamathite, and said,
Job 20:2 א: Therefore do my thoughts cause me to answer,
Job 20:2 ב: and for [this] I make haste.
Job 20:3 א: I have heard the check of my reproach,
Job 20:3 ב: and the spirit of my understanding causeth me to answer.
Job 20:4 א: Knowest thou [not] this of old,
Job 20:4 ב: since man was placed upon earth,
Job 20:5 א: That the triumphing of the wicked [is] short,
Job 20:5 ב: and the joy of the hypocrite
Job 20:5 ג: [but] for a moment?
Job 20:6 א: Though his excellency mount up to the heavens,
Job 20:6 ב: and his head reach unto the clouds;
Job 20:7 א: [Yet] he shall perish for ever like his own dung:
Job 20:7 ב: they which have seen him shall say, Where [is] he?
Job 20:8 א: He shall fly away as a dream, and shall not be found:
Job 20:8 ב: yea, he shall be chased away as a vision of the night.
Job 20:9 א: The eye also [which] saw him shall [see him] no more;
Job 20:9 ב: neither shall his place any more behold him.
Job 20:10 א: His children shall seek to please the poor,
Job 20:10 ב: and his hands shall restore their goods.
Job 20:11 א: His bones are full [of the sin] of his youth,
Job 20:11 ב: which shall lie down with him in the dust.
Job 20:12 א: Though wickedness be sweet in his mouth,
Job 20:12 ב: [though] he hide it under his tongue;
Job 20:13 א: [Though] he spare it, and forsake it not;
Job 20:13 ב: but keep it still within his mouth:
Job 20:14 א: [Yet] his meat in his bowels is turned,
Job 20:14 ב: [it is] the gall of asps within him.
Job 20:15 א: He hath swallowed down riches,
Job 20:15 ב: and he shall vomit them up again: [...] of his belly.
Job 20:15 ג: God shall cast them out
Job 20:16 א: He shall suck the poison of asps:
Job 20:16 ב: the viper’s tongue shall slay him.
Job 20:17 א: He shall not see the rivers, the floods,
Job 20:17 ב: the brooks of honey and butter.
Job 20:18 א: That which he laboured for shall he restore, and shall not swallow [it] down:
Job 20:18 ב: according to [his] substance [shall] the restitution [be],
Job 20:18 ג: and he shall not rejoice [therein].
Job 20:19 א: Because he hath oppressed
Job 20:19 ב: [and] hath forsaken the poor;
Job 20:19 ג: [because] he hath violently taken away an house which he builded not;
Job 20:20 א: Surely he shall not feel quietness in his belly,
Job 20:20 ב: he shall not save of that which he desired.
Job 20:21 א: There shall none of his meat be left;
Job 20:21 ב: therefore shall no man look for his goods.
Job 20:22 א: In the fulness of his sufficiency he shall be in straits:
Job 20:22 ב: every hand of the wicked shall come upon him.
Job 20:23 א: [When] he is about to fill his belly,
Job 20:23 ב: [God] shall cast the fury of his wrath upon him,
Job 20:23 ג: and shall rain [it] upon him while he is eating.
Job 20:24 א: He shall flee from the iron weapon,
Job 20:24 ב: [and] the bow of steel shall strike him through.
Job 20:25 א: It is drawn, and cometh out of the body;
Job 20:25 ב: yea, the glittering sword [...] of his gall:
Job 20:25 ג: cometh out [...] terrors [are] upon him.
Job 20:26 א: All darkness [shall be] hid in his secret places:
Job 20:26 ב: a fire not blown shall consume him;
Job 20:26 ג: it shall go ill with him that is left in his tabernacle.
Job 20:27 א: The heaven shall reveal his iniquity;
Job 20:27 ב: and the earth shall rise up against him.
Job 20:28 א: The increase of his house shall depart,
Job 20:28 ב: [and his goods] shall flow away in the day of his wrath.
Job 20:29 א: This [is] the portion of a wicked man from God,
Job 20:29 ב: and the heritage appointed unto him by God.
Job 21:1 א: But Job answered and said,
Job 21:2 א: Hear diligently my speech,
Job 21:2 ב: and let this be your consolations.
Job 21:3 א: Suffer me that I may speak;
Job 21:3 ב: and after that I have spoken, mock on.
Job 21:4 א: As for me, [is] my complaint to man?
Job 21:4 ב: and if [it were so], why should not my spirit be troubled?
Job 21:5 א: Mark me, and be astonished,
Job 21:5 ב: and lay [your] hand upon [your] mouth.
Job 21:6 א: Even when I remember I am afraid,
Job 21:6 ב: and trembling taketh hold on my flesh.
Job 21:7 א: Wherefore do the wicked live,
Job 21:7 ב: become old,
Job 21:7 ג: yea, are mighty in power?
Job 21:8 א: Their seed is established in their sight with them,
Job 21:8 ב: and their offspring before their eyes.
Job 21:9 א: Their houses [are] safe from fear,
Job 21:9 ב: neither [is] the rod of God upon them.
Job 21:10 א: Their bull gendereth, and faileth not;
Job 21:10 ב: their cow calveth, and casteth not her calf.
Job 21:11 א: They send forth their little ones like a flock,
Job 21:11 ב: and their children dance.
Job 21:12 א: They take the timbrel and harp,
Job 21:12 ב: and rejoice at the sound of the organ.
Job 21:13 א: They spend their days in wealth,
Job 21:13 ב: and in a moment go down to the grave.
Job 21:14 א: Therefore they say unto God, Depart from us;
Job 21:14 ב: for we desire not the knowledge of thy ways.
Job 21:15 א: What [is] the Almighty, that we should serve him?
Job 21:15 ב: and what profit should we have, if we pray unto him?
Job 21:16 א: Lo, their good [is] not in their hand:
Job 21:16 ב: the counsel of the wicked is far from me.
Job 21:17 א: How oft is the candle of the wicked put out!
Job 21:17 ב: and [how oft] cometh their destruction upon them!
Job 21:17 ג: [God] distributeth sorrows in his anger.
Job 21:18 א: They are as stubble before the wind,
Job 21:18 ב: and as chaff that the storm carrieth away.
Job 21:19 א: God layeth up his iniquity for his children:
Job 21:19 ב: he rewardeth him, and he shall know [it].
Job 21:20 א: His eyes shall see his destruction,
Job 21:20 ב: and he shall drink of the wrath of the Almighty.
Job 21:21 א: For what pleasure [hath] he
Job 21:21 ב: in his house after him,
Job 21:21 ג: when the number of his months is cut off in the midst?
Job 21:22 א: Shall [any] teach God knowledge?
Job 21:22 ב: seeing he judgeth those that are high.
Job 21:23 א: One dieth in his full strength,
Job 21:23 ב: being wholly at ease and quiet.
Job 21:24 א: His breasts are full of milk,
Job 21:24 ב: and his bones are moistened with marrow.
Job 21:25 א: And another dieth in the bitterness of his soul,
Job 21:25 ב: and never eateth with pleasure.
Job 21:26 א: They shall lie down alike in the dust,
Job 21:26 ב: and the worms shall cover them.
Job 21:27 א: Behold, I know your thoughts,
Job 21:27 ב: and the devices [which] ye wrongfully imagine against me.
Job 21:28 א: For ye say,
Job 21:28 ב: Where [is] the house of the prince?
Job 21:28 ג: and where [are] the dwelling places of the wicked?
Job 21:29 א: Have ye not asked them that go by the way?
Job 21:29 ב: and do ye not know their tokens,
Job 21:30 א: That the wicked is reserved to the day of destruction?
Job 21:30 ב: they shall be brought forth to the day of wrath.
Job 21:31 א: Who shall declare his way to his face?
Job 21:31 ב: and [...] [what] he hath done?
Job 21:31 ג: who shall repay him
Job 21:32 א: Yet shall he be brought to the grave,
Job 21:32 ב: and shall remain in the tomb.
Job 21:33 א: The clods of the valley shall be sweet unto him,
Job 21:33 ב: and every man shall draw after him,
Job 21:33 ג: as [there are] innumerable before him.
Job 21:34 א: How then comfort ye me in vain,
Job 21:34 ב: seeing in your answers there remaineth falsehood?
Job 22:1 א: Then Eliphaz the Temanite answered and said,
Job 22:2 א: Can a man be profitable unto God,
Job 22:2 ב: as he that is wise may be profitable unto himself?
Job 22:3 א: [Is it] any pleasure to the Almighty, that thou art righteous?
Job 22:3 ב: or [is it] gain [to him], that thou makest thy ways perfect?
Job 22:4 א: Will he reprove thee for fear of thee?
Job 22:4 ב: will he enter with thee into judgment?
Job 22:5 א: [Is] not thy wickedness great?
Job 22:5 ב: and thine iniquities infinite?
Job 22:6 א: For thou hast taken a pledge from thy brother for nought,
Job 22:6 ב: and stripped the naked of their clothing.
Job 22:7 א: Thou hast not given water to the weary to drink,
Job 22:7 ב: and thou hast withholden bread from the hungry.
Job 22:8 א: But [as for] the mighty man, he had the earth;
Job 22:8 ב: and the honourable man dwelt in it.
Job 22:9 א: Thou hast sent widows away empty,
Job 22:9 ב: and the arms of the fatherless have been broken.
Job 22:10 א: Therefore snares [are] round about thee,
Job 22:10 ב: and sudden fear troubleth thee;
Job 22:11 א: Or darkness, [that] thou canst not see;
Job 22:11 ב: and abundance of waters cover thee.
Job 22:12 א: [Is] not God in the height of heaven?
Job 22:12 ב: and behold the height of the stars, how high they are!
Job 22:13 א: And thou sayest, How doth God know?
Job 22:13 ב: can he judge through the dark cloud?
Job 22:14 א: Thick clouds [are] a covering to him,
Job 22:14 ב: that he seeth not;
Job 22:14 ג: and he walketh in the circuit of heaven.
Job 22:15 א: Hast thou marked the old way
Job 22:15 ב: which wicked men have trodden?
Job 22:16 א: Which were cut down
Job 22:16 ב: out of time, whose foundation was overflown with a flood:
Job 22:17 א: Which said unto God, Depart from us:
Job 22:17 ב: and what can the Almighty do for them?
Job 22:18 א: Yet he filled their houses with good [things]:
Job 22:18 ב: but the counsel of the wicked is far from me.
Job 22:19 א: The righteous see [it], and are glad:
Job 22:19 ב: and the innocent laugh them to scorn.
Job 22:20 א: Whereas our substance is not cut down,
Job 22:20 ב: but the remnant of them the fire consumeth.
Job 22:21 א: Acquaint now thyself with him, and be at peace:
Job 22:21 ב: thereby good shall come unto thee.
Job 22:22 א: Receive, I pray thee, the law from his mouth,
Job 22:22 ב: and lay up his words in thine heart.
Job 22:23 א: If thou return to the Almighty, thou shalt be built up,
Job 22:23 ב: thou shalt put away iniquity far from thy tabernacles.
Job 22:24 א: Then shalt thou lay up gold as dust,
Job 22:24 ב: and the [gold] of Ophir as the stones of the brooks.
Job 22:25 א: Yea, the Almighty shall be thy defence,
Job 22:25 ב: and thou shalt have plenty of silver.
Job 22:26 א: For then shalt thou have thy delight in the Almighty,
Job 22:26 ב: and shalt lift up thy face unto God.
Job 22:27 א: Thou shalt make thy prayer unto him, and he shall hear thee,
Job 22:27 ב: and thou shalt pay thy vows.
Job 22:28 א: Thou shalt also decree a thing,
Job 22:28 ב: and it shall be established unto thee:
Job 22:28 ג: and the light shall shine upon thy ways.
Job 22:29 א: When [men] are cast down, then thou shalt say, [There is] lifting up;
Job 22:29 ב: and he shall save the humble person.
Job 22:30 א: He shall deliver the island of the innocent:
Job 22:30 ב: and it is delivered by the pureness of thine hands.
Job 23:1 א: Then Job answered and said,
Job 23:2 א: Even to day [is] my complaint bitter:
Job 23:2 ב: my stroke is heavier than my groaning.
Job 23:3 א: Oh that I knew where I might find him!
Job 23:3 ב: [that] I might come [even] to his seat!
Job 23:4 א: I would order [my] cause before him,
Job 23:4 ב: and fill my mouth with arguments.
Job 23:5 א: I would know the words [which] he would answer me,
Job 23:5 ב: and understand what he would say unto me.
Job 23:6 א: Will he plead against me with [his] great power?
Job 23:6 ב: No; but he would put [strength] in me.
Job 23:7 א: There the righteous might dispute with him;
Job 23:7 ב: so should I be delivered for ever from my judge.
Job 23:8 א: Behold, I go forward, but he [is] not [there];
Job 23:8 ב: and backward, but I cannot perceive him:
Job 23:9 א: On the left hand, where he doth work, but I cannot behold [him]:
Job 23:9 ב: he hideth himself on the right hand, that I cannot see [him]:
Job 23:10 א: But he knoweth the way that I take: [when] he hath tried me,
Job 23:10 ב: I shall come forth as gold.
Job 23:11 א: My foot hath held his steps,
Job 23:11 ב: his way have I kept,
Job 23:11 ג: and not declined.
Job 23:12 א: from the commandment of his lips;
Job 23:12 ב: Neither have I gone back
Job 23:12 ג: I have esteemed the words of his mouth more than my necessary [food].
Job 23:13 א: But he [is] in one [mind], and who can turn him?
Job 23:13 ב: and [what] his soul desireth, even [that] he doeth.
Job 23:14 א: For he performeth [the thing that is] appointed for me:
Job 23:14 ב: and many such [things are] with him.
Job 23:15 א: Therefore am I troubled at his presence:
Job 23:15 ב: when I consider, I am afraid of him.
Job 23:16 א: For God maketh my heart soft,
Job 23:16 ב: and the Almighty troubleth me:
Job 23:17 א: Because I was not cut off before the darkness,
Job 23:17 ב: [neither] hath he covered the darkness from my face.
Job 24:1 א: Why, seeing times are not hidden from the Almighty,
Job 24:1 ב: do they that know him not see his days?
Job 24:2 א: [Some] remove the landmarks;
Job 24:2 ב: they violently take away flocks, and feed [thereof].
Job 24:3 א: They drive away the ass of the fatherless,
Job 24:3 ב: they take the widow’s ox for a pledge.
Job 24:4 א: They turn the needy out of the way:
Job 24:4 ב: the poor of the earth hide themselves together.
Job 24:5 א: Behold, [as] wild asses in the desert,
Job 24:5 ב: go they forth to their work;
Job 24:5 ג: rising betimes for a prey:
Job 24:5 ד: the wilderness [yieldeth] food for them [and] for [their] children.
Job 24:6 א: They reap [every one] his corn in the field:
Job 24:6 ב: and they gather the vintage of the wicked.
Job 24:7 א: They cause the naked to lodge without clothing,
Job 24:7 ב: that [they have] no covering in the cold.
Job 24:8 א: They are wet with the showers of the mountains,
Job 24:8 ב: and embrace the rock for want of a shelter.
Job 24:9 א: They pluck the fatherless from the breast,
Job 24:9 ב: and take a pledge of the poor.
Job 24:10 א: They cause [him] to go naked without clothing,
Job 24:10 ב: and they take away the sheaf [from] the hungry;
Job 24:11 א: [Which] make oil within their walls,
Job 24:11 ב: [and] tread [their] winepresses, and suffer thirst.
Job 24:12 א: Men groan from out of the city,
Job 24:12 ב: and the soul of the wounded crieth out:
Job 24:12 ג: yet God layeth not folly [to them].
Job 24:13 א: They are of those that rebel against the light;
Job 24:13 ב: they know not the ways thereof,
Job 24:13 ג: nor abide in the paths thereof.
Job 24:14 א: rising with the light
Job 24:14 ב: The murderer [...] killeth the poor and needy,
Job 24:14 ג: and in the night is as a thief.
Job 24:15 א: The eye also of the adulterer waiteth for the twilight, saying,
Job 24:15 ב: No eye shall see me:
Job 24:15 ג: and disguiseth [his] face.
Job 24:16 א: In the dark they dig through houses,
Job 24:16 ב: [which] they had marked for themselves in the daytime:
Job 24:16 ג: they know not the light.
Job 24:17 א: For the morning [is] to them even as the shadow of death:
Job 24:17 ב: if [one] know [them, they are in] the terrors of the shadow of death.
Job 24:18 א: He [is] swift as the waters;
Job 24:18 ב: their portion is cursed in the earth:
Job 24:18 ג: he beholdeth not the way of the vineyards.
Job 24:19 א: Drought and heat
Job 24:19 ב: consume the snow waters:
Job 24:19 ג: [so doth] the grave [those which] have sinned.
Job 24:20 א: The womb shall forget him;
Job 24:20 ב: the worm shall feed sweetly on him;
Job 24:20 ג: he shall be no more remembered;
Job 24:20 ד: and wickedness shall be broken as a tree.
Job 24:21 א: He evil entreateth the barren [that] beareth not:
Job 24:21 ב: and doeth not good to the widow.
Job 24:22 א: He draweth also the mighty with his power:
Job 24:22 ב: he riseth up, and no [man] is sure of life.
Job 24:23 א: [Though] it be given him [to be] in safety, whereon he resteth;
Job 24:23 ב: yet his eyes [are] upon their ways.
Job 24:24 א: They are exalted for a little while, but are gone
Job 24:24 ב: and brought low; they are taken out of the way as all [other],
Job 24:24 ג: and cut off as the tops of the ears of corn.
Job 24:25 א: And if [it be] not [so]
Job 24:25 ב: now, who will make me a liar,
Job 24:25 ג: and make my speech nothing worth?
Job 25:1 א: Then answered Bildad the Shuhite, and said,
Job 25:2 א: Dominion and fear [are] with him,
Job 25:2 ב: he maketh peace in his high places.
Job 25:3 א: Is there any number of his armies?
Job 25:3 ב: and upon whom doth not his light arise?
Job 25:4 א: How then can man be justified with God?
Job 25:4 ב: or how can he be clean [that is] born of a woman?
Job 25:5 א: Behold even to the moon,
Job 25:5 ב: and it shineth not;
Job 25:5 ג: yea, the stars are not pure in his sight.
Job 25:6 א: How much less man, [that is] a worm?
Job 25:6 ב: and the son of man, [which is] a worm?
Job 26:1 א: But Job answered and said,
Job 26:2 א: How hast thou helped [him that is] without power?
Job 26:2 ב: [how] savest thou the arm [that hath] no strength?
Job 26:3 א: How hast thou counselled [him that hath] no wisdom?
Job 26:3 ב: and [how] hast thou plentifully declared the thing as it is?
Job 26:4 א: To whom hast thou uttered words?
Job 26:4 ב: and whose spirit came from thee?
Job 26:5 א: Dead [things] are formed from under the waters,
Job 26:5 ב: and the inhabitants thereof.
Job 26:6 א: Hell [is] naked before him,
Job 26:6 ב: and destruction hath no covering.
Job 26:7 א: He stretcheth out the north over the empty place,
Job 26:7 ב: [and] hangeth the earth upon nothing.
Job 26:8 א: He bindeth up the waters in his thick clouds;
Job 26:8 ב: and the cloud is not rent under them.
Job 26:9 א: He holdeth back the face of his throne,
Job 26:9 ב: [and] spreadeth his cloud upon it.
Job 26:10 א: He hath compassed the waters with bounds,
Job 26:10 ב: until the day and night come to an end.
Job 26:11 א: The pillars of heaven tremble
Job 26:11 ב: and are astonished at his reproof.
Job 26:12 א: He divideth the sea with his power,
Job 26:12 ב: and by his understanding he smiteth through the proud.
Job 26:13 א: By his spirit he hath garnished the heavens;
Job 26:13 ב: his hand hath formed the crooked serpent.
Job 26:14 א: Lo, these [are] parts of his ways:
Job 26:14 ב: but how little a portion is heard of him?
Job 26:14 ג: but the thunder of his power who can understand?
Job 27:1 א: Moreover Job continued his parable, and said,
Job 27:2 א: [As] God liveth, [who] hath taken away my judgment;
Job 27:2 ב: and the Almighty, [who] hath vexed my soul;
Job 27:3 א: All the while my breath [is] in me,
Job 27:3 ב: and the spirit of God [is] in my nostrils;
Job 27:4 א: My lips shall not speak wickedness,
Job 27:4 ב: nor my tongue utter deceit.
Job 27:5 א: God forbid that I should justify you:
Job 27:5 ב: till I die
Job 27:5 ג: I will not remove mine integrity from me.
Job 27:6 א: My righteousness I hold fast, and will not let it go:
Job 27:6 ב: my heart shall not reproach [me] so long as I live.
Job 27:7 א: Let mine enemy be as the wicked,
Job 27:7 ב: and he that riseth up against me as the unrighteous.
Job 27:8 א: For what [is] the hope of the hypocrite, though he hath gained,
Job 27:8 ב: when God taketh away his soul?
Job 27:9 א: Will God hear his cry
Job 27:9 ב: when trouble cometh upon him?
Job 27:10 א: Will he delight himself in the Almighty?
Job 27:10 ב: will he always call upon God?
Job 27:11 א: I will teach you by the hand of God:
Job 27:11 ב: [that] which [is] with the Almighty will I not conceal.
Job 27:12 א: Behold, all ye yourselves have seen [it];
Job 27:12 ב: why then are ye thus altogether vain?
Job 27:13 א: This [is] the portion of a wicked man with God,
Job 27:13 ב: and the heritage of oppressors, [which] they shall receive of the Almighty.
Job 27:14 א: If his children be multiplied, [it is] for the sword:
Job 27:14 ב: and his offspring shall not be satisfied with bread.
Job 27:15 א: Those that remain of him shall be buried in death:
Job 27:15 ב: and his widows shall not weep.
Job 27:16 א: Though he heap up silver as the dust,
Job 27:16 ב: and prepare raiment as the clay;
Job 27:17 א: He may prepare [it],
Job 27:17 ב: but the just shall put [it] on,
Job 27:17 ג: and the innocent shall divide the silver.
Job 27:18 א: He buildeth his house as a moth,
Job 27:18 ב: and as a booth [that] the keeper maketh.
Job 27:19 א: The rich man shall lie down, but he shall not be gathered:
Job 27:19 ב: he openeth his eyes, and he [is] not.
Job 27:20 א: Terrors take hold on him as waters, [...] in the night.
Job 27:20 ב: a tempest stealeth him away
Job 27:21 א: The east wind carrieth him away, and he departeth:
Job 27:21 ב: and as a storm hurleth him out of his place.
Job 27:22 א: For [God] shall cast upon him, and not spare:
Job 27:22 ב: he would fain flee out of his hand.
Job 27:23 א: [Men] shall clap their hands at him,
Job 27:23 ב: and shall hiss him out of his place.
Job 28:1 א: Surely there is a vein for the silver,
Job 28:1 ב: and a place for gold [where] they fine [it].
Job 28:2 א: Iron is taken out of the earth,
Job 28:2 ב: and brass [is] molten [out of] the stone.
Job 28:3 א: He setteth an end to darkness,
Job 28:3 ב: and searcheth out all perfection:
Job 28:3 ג: the stones of darkness, and the shadow of death.
Job 28:4 א: The flood breaketh out from the inhabitant;
Job 28:4 ב: [even the waters] forgotten of the foot: they are dried up,
Job 28:4 ג: they are gone away from men.
Job 28:5 א: [As for] the earth, out of it cometh bread:
Job 28:5 ב: and under it is turned up as it were fire.
Job 28:6 א: The stones of it [are] the place of sapphires:
Job 28:6 ב: and it hath dust of gold.
Job 28:7 א: [There is] a path which no fowl knoweth,
Job 28:7 ב: and which the vulture’s eye hath not seen:
Job 28:8 א: The lion’s whelps have not trodden it,
Job 28:8 ב: nor the fierce lion passed by it.
Job 28:9 א: He putteth forth his hand upon the rock;
Job 28:9 ב: he overturneth the mountains by the roots.
Job 28:10 א: He cutteth out rivers among the rocks;
Job 28:10 ב: and his eye seeth every precious thing.
Job 28:11 א: He bindeth the floods from overflowing;
Job 28:11 ב: and [the thing that is] hid bringeth he forth to light.
Job 28:12 א: But where shall wisdom be found?
Job 28:12 ב: and where [is] the place of understanding?
Job 28:13 א: Man knoweth not the price thereof;
Job 28:13 ב: neither is it found in the land of the living.
Job 28:14 א: The depth saith, It [is] not in me:
Job 28:14 ב: and the sea saith, [It is] not with me.
Job 28:15 א: It cannot be gotten for gold,
Job 28:15 ב: neither shall silver be weighed [for] the price thereof.
Job 28:16 א: It cannot be valued with the gold of Ophir,
Job 28:16 ב: with the precious onyx, or the sapphire.
Job 28:17 א: The gold and the crystal cannot equal it:
Job 28:17 ב: and the exchange of it [shall not be for] jewels of fine gold.
Job 28:18 א: No mention shall be made of coral, or of pearls:
Job 28:18 ב: for the price of wisdom [is] above rubies.
Job 28:19 א: The topaz of Ethiopia shall not equal it,
Job 28:19 ב: neither shall it be valued with pure gold.
Job 28:20 א: Whence then cometh wisdom?
Job 28:20 ב: and where [is] the place of understanding?
Job 28:21 א: Seeing it is hid from the eyes of all living,
Job 28:21 ב: and kept close from the fowls of the air.
Job 28:22 א: Destruction and death say,
Job 28:22 ב: We have heard the fame thereof with our ears.
Job 28:23 א: God understandeth the way thereof,
Job 28:23 ב: and he knoweth the place thereof.
Job 28:24 א: For he looketh to the ends of the earth,
Job 28:24 ב: [and] seeth under the whole heaven;
Job 28:25 א: To make the weight for the winds;
Job 28:25 ב: and he weigheth the waters by measure.
Job 28:26 א: When he made a decree for the rain,
Job 28:26 ב: and a way for the lightning of the thunder:
Job 28:27 א: Then did he see it, and declare it;
Job 28:27 ב: he prepared it,
Job 28:27 ג: yea, and searched it out.
Job 28:28 א: And unto man he said,
Job 28:28 ב: Behold, the fear of the Lord,
Job 28:28 ג: that [is] wisdom;
Job 28:28 ד: and to depart from evil
Job 28:28 ה: [is] understanding.
Job 29:1 א: Moreover Job continued his parable, and said,
Job 29:2 א: Oh that I were as [in] months past,
Job 29:2 ב: as [in] the days [when] God preserved me;
Job 29:3 א: When his candle shined upon my head,
Job 29:3 ב: [and when] by his light I walked [through] darkness;
Job 29:4 א: As I was in the days of my youth,
Job 29:4 ב: when the secret of God [was] upon my tabernacle;
Job 29:5 א: When the Almighty [was] yet with me,
Job 29:5 ב: [when] my children [were] about me;
Job 29:6 א: When I washed my steps with butter,
Job 29:6 ב: and the rock poured me out rivers of oil;
Job 29:7 א: When I went out to the gate through the city,
Job 29:7 ב: [when] I prepared my seat in the street!
Job 29:8 א: The young men saw me, and hid themselves:
Job 29:8 ב: and the aged arose, [and] stood up.
Job 29:9 א: The princes refrained talking,
Job 29:9 ב: and laid [their] hand on their mouth.
Job 29:10 א: The nobles held their peace,
Job 29:10 ב: and their tongue cleaved to the roof of their mouth.
Job 29:11 א: When the ear heard [me], then it blessed me;
Job 29:11 ב: and when the eye saw [me], it gave witness to me:
Job 29:12 א: Because I delivered the poor that cried,
Job 29:12 ב: and the fatherless, and [him that had] none to help him.
Job 29:13 א: The blessing of him that was ready to perish came upon me:
Job 29:13 ב: and I caused the widow’s heart to sing for joy.
Job 29:14 א: I put on righteousness, and it clothed me:
Job 29:14 ב: my judgment [was] as a robe and a diadem.
Job 29:15 א: I was eyes to the blind,
Job 29:15 ב: and feet [was] I to the lame.
Job 29:16 א: I [was] a father to the poor:
Job 29:16 ב: and the cause [which] I knew not
Job 29:16 ג: I searched out.
Job 29:17 א: And I brake the jaws of the wicked,
Job 29:17 ב: and plucked the spoil out of his teeth.
Job 29:18 א: Then I said, I shall die in my nest,
Job 29:18 ב: and I shall multiply [my] days as the sand.
Job 29:19 א: My root [was] spread out by the waters,
Job 29:19 ב: and the dew lay all night upon my branch.
Job 29:20 א: My glory [was] fresh in me,
Job 29:20 ב: and my bow was renewed in my hand.
Job 29:21 א: Unto me [men] gave ear, and waited, and kept silence at my counsel.
Job 29:22 א: After my words they spake not again;
Job 29:22 ב: and my speech dropped upon them.
Job 29:23 א: And they waited for me as for the rain;
Job 29:23 ב: and they opened their mouth wide [as] for the latter rain.
Job 29:24 א: [If] I laughed on them,
Job 29:24 ב: they believed [it] not;
Job 29:24 ג: and the light of my countenance they cast not down.
Job 29:25 א: I chose out their way, and sat chief,
Job 29:25 ב: and dwelt as a king in the army,
Job 29:25 ג: as one [that] comforteth the mourners.
Job 30:1 א: But now [they that are] younger than I have me in derision,
Job 30:1 ב: whose fathers I would have disdained
Job 30:1 ג: to have set with the dogs of my flock.
Job 30:2 א: Yea, whereto [might] the strength of their hands [profit] me,
Job 30:2 ב: in whom old age was perished?
Job 30:3 א: For want and famine [they were] solitary;
Job 30:3 ב: fleeing into the wilderness in former time
Job 30:3 ג: desolate and waste.
Job 30:4 א: Who cut up mallows by the bushes,
Job 30:4 ב: and juniper roots [for] their meat.
Job 30:5 א: They were driven forth from among [men],
Job 30:5 ב: (they cried after them as [after] a thief;)
Job 30:6 א: in the clifts of the valleys,
Job 30:6 ב: To dwell [...] [in] caves of the earth, and [in] the rocks.
Job 30:7 א: Among the bushes they brayed;
Job 30:7 ב: under the nettles they were gathered together.
Job 30:8 א: [They were] children of fools,
Job 30:8 ב: yea, children of base men:
Job 30:8 ג: they were viler than the earth.
Job 30:9 א: And now am I their song,
Job 30:9 ב: yea, I am their byword.
Job 30:10 א: They abhor me,
Job 30:10 ב: they flee far from me,
Job 30:10 ג: and spare not to spit in my face.
Job 30:11 א: Because he hath loosed my cord, and afflicted me,
Job 30:11 ב: they have also let loose the bridle before me.
Job 30:12 א: Upon [my] right [hand] rise the youth;
Job 30:12 ב: they push away my feet,
Job 30:12 ג: and they raise up against me the ways of their destruction.
Job 30:13 א: They mar my path,
Job 30:13 ב: they set forward my calamity,
Job 30:13 ג: they have no helper.
Job 30:14 א: They came [upon me] as a wide breaking in [of waters]:
Job 30:14 ב: in the desolation they rolled themselves [upon me].
Job 30:15 א: Terrors are turned upon me:
Job 30:15 ב: they pursue my soul as the wind:
Job 30:15 ג: and my welfare passeth away as a cloud.
Job 30:16 א: And now my soul is poured out upon me;
Job 30:16 ב: the days of affliction have taken hold upon me.
Job 30:17 א: My bones are pierced in me in the night season:
Job 30:17 ב: and my sinews take no rest.
Job 30:18 א: By the great force [of my disease] is my garment changed:
Job 30:18 ב: it bindeth me about as the collar of my coat.
Job 30:19 א: He hath cast me into the mire,
Job 30:19 ב: and I am become like dust and ashes.
Job 30:20 א: I cry unto thee, and thou dost not hear me:
Job 30:20 ב: I stand up, and thou regardest me [not].
Job 30:21 א: Thou art become cruel to me:
Job 30:21 ב: with thy strong hand thou opposest thyself against me.
Job 30:22 א: Thou liftest me up to the wind;
Job 30:22 ב: thou causest me to ride [upon it],
Job 30:22 ג: and dissolvest my substance.
Job 30:23 א: For I know [that] thou wilt bring me [to] death,
Job 30:23 ב: and [to] the house appointed for all living.
Job 30:24 א: Howbeit he will not stretch out [his] hand to the grave,
Job 30:24 ב: though they cry in his destruction.
Job 30:25 א: Did not I weep for him that was in trouble?
Job 30:25 ב: was [not] my soul grieved for the poor?
Job 30:26 א: When I looked for good, then evil came [unto me]:
Job 30:26 ב: and when I waited for light, there came darkness.
Job 30:27 א: My bowels boiled, and rested not:
Job 30:27 ב: the days of affliction prevented me.
Job 30:28 א: I went mourning without the sun:
Job 30:28 ב: I stood up, [and] [...] in the congregation.
Job 30:28 ג: I cried
Job 30:29 א: I am a brother to dragons,
Job 30:29 ב: and a companion to owls.
Job 30:30 א: My skin is black upon me,
Job 30:30 ב: and my bones are burned with heat.
Job 30:31 א: My harp also is [turned] to mourning,
Job 30:31 ב: and my organ into the voice of them that weep.
Job 31:1 א: I made a covenant with mine eyes;
Job 31:1 ב: why then should I think upon a maid?
Job 31:2 א: For what portion of God [is there] from above?
Job 31:2 ב: and [what] inheritance of the Almighty from on high?
Job 31:3 א: [Is] not destruction to the wicked?
Job 31:3 ב: and a strange [punishment] to the workers of iniquity?
Job 31:4 א: Doth not he see my ways,
Job 31:4 ב: and count all my steps?
Job 31:5 א: If I have walked with vanity,
Job 31:5 ב: or if my foot hath hasted to deceit;
Job 31:6 א: Let me be weighed in an even balance,
Job 31:6 ב: that God may know mine integrity.
Job 31:7 א: If my step hath turned out of the way,
Job 31:7 ב: and mine heart walked after mine eyes,
Job 31:7 ג: and if any blot hath cleaved to mine hands;
Job 31:8 א: [Then] let me sow, and let another eat;
Job 31:8 ב: yea, let my offspring be rooted out.
Job 31:9 א: If mine heart have been deceived by a woman,
Job 31:9 ב: or [if] I have laid wait at my neighbour’s door;
Job 31:10 א: [Then] let my wife grind unto another,
Job 31:10 ב: and let others bow down upon her.
Job 31:11 א: For this [is] an heinous crime;
Job 31:11 ב: yea, it [is] an iniquity [to be punished by] the judges.
Job 31:12 א: For it [is] a fire
Job 31:12 ב: [that] consumeth to destruction,
Job 31:12 ג: and would root out all mine increase.
Job 31:13 א: If I did despise the cause of my manservant or of my maidservant,
Job 31:13 ב: when they contended with me;
Job 31:14 א: What then shall I do when God riseth up?
Job 31:14 ב: and when he visiteth,
Job 31:14 ג: what shall I answer him?
Job 31:15 א: Did not he that made me in the womb make him?
Job 31:15 ב: and did not one fashion us in the womb?
Job 31:16 א: If I have withheld the poor from [their] desire,
Job 31:16 ב: or have caused the eyes of the widow to fail;
Job 31:17 א: Or have eaten my morsel myself alone,
Job 31:17 ב: and the fatherless hath not eaten thereof;
Job 31:18 א: (For from my youth he was brought up with me, as [with] a father,
Job 31:18 ב: and I have guided her from my mother’s womb;)
Job 31:19 א: If I have seen any perish for want of clothing,
Job 31:19 ב: or any poor without covering;
Job 31:20 א: If his loins have not blessed me,
Job 31:20 ב: and [if] he were [not] warmed with the fleece of my sheep;
Job 31:21 א: If I have lifted up my hand against the fatherless,
Job 31:21 ב: when I saw my help in the gate:
Job 31:22 א: [Then] let mine arm fall from my shoulder blade,
Job 31:22 ב: and mine arm be broken from the bone.
Job 31:23 א: For destruction [from] God [was] a terror to me,
Job 31:23 ב: and by reason of his highness I could not endure.
Job 31:24 א: If I have made gold my hope,
Job 31:24 ב: or have said to the fine gold, [Thou art] my confidence;
Job 31:25 א: If I rejoiced because my wealth [was] great,
Job 31:25 ב: and because mine hand had gotten much;
Job 31:26 א: If I beheld the sun when it shined,
Job 31:26 ב: or the moon walking [in] brightness;
Job 31:27 א: And my heart hath been secretly enticed,
Job 31:27 ב: or my mouth hath kissed my hand:
Job 31:28 א: This also [were] an iniquity [to be punished by] the judge:
Job 31:28 ב: for I should have denied the God [that is] above.
Job 31:29 א: If I rejoiced at the destruction of him that hated me,
Job 31:29 ב: or lifted up myself when evil found him:
Job 31:30 א: Neither have I suffered my mouth to sin
Job 31:30 ב: by wishing a curse to his soul.
Job 31:31 א: If the men of my tabernacle said not,
Job 31:31 ב: Oh that we had of his flesh!
Job 31:31 ג: we cannot be satisfied.
Job 31:32 א: The stranger did not lodge in the street:
Job 31:32 ב: [but] I opened my doors to the traveller.
Job 31:33 א: If I covered my transgressions as Adam,
Job 31:33 ב: by hiding mine iniquity in my bosom:
Job 31:34 א: Did I fear a great multitude,
Job 31:34 ב: or did the contempt of families terrify me, that I kept silence,
Job 31:34 ג: [and] went not out of the door?
Job 31:35 א: Oh that one would hear me!
Job 31:35 ב: behold, my desire [is, that]
Job 31:35 ג: the Almighty would answer me,
Job 31:35 ד: and [that] mine adversary had written a book.
Job 31:36 א: Surely I would take it upon my shoulder,
Job 31:36 ב: [and] bind it [as] a crown to me.
Job 31:37 א: I would declare unto him the number of my steps;
Job 31:37 ב: as a prince would I go near unto him.
Job 31:38 א: If my land cry against me,
Job 31:38 ב: or that the furrows likewise thereof complain;
Job 31:39 א: If I have eaten the fruits thereof
Job 31:39 ב: without money,
Job 31:39 ג: or have caused the owners thereof to lose their life:
Job 31:40 א: Let thistles grow instead of wheat,
Job 31:40 ב: and cockle instead of barley.
Job 31:40 ג: The words of Job are ended.
Job 32:1 א: So these three men ceased
Job 32:1 ב: to answer Job,
Job 32:1 ג: because he [was] righteous in his own eyes.
Job 32:2 א: Then was kindled the wrath of Elihu
Job 32:2 ב: the son of Barachel the Buzite, of the kindred of Ram:
Job 32:2 ג: against Job was his wrath kindled,
Job 32:2 ד: because he justified himself rather than God.
Job 32:3 א: Also against his three friends was his wrath kindled,
Job 32:3 ב: because they had found no answer,
Job 32:3 ג: and [yet] had condemned Job.
Job 32:4 א: Now Elihu had waited till Job had spoken,
Job 32:4 ב: because they [were] elder than he.
Job 32:5 א: When Elihu saw that [there was] no answer
Job 32:5 ב: in the mouth of [these] three men,
Job 32:5 ג: then his wrath was kindled.
Job 32:6 א: And Elihu the son of Barachel the Buzite answered and said,
Job 32:6 ב: I [am] young,
Job 32:6 ג: and ye [are] very old;
Job 32:6 ד: wherefore I was afraid,
Job 32:6 ה: and durst not shew you mine opinion.
Job 32:7 א: I said, Days should speak,
Job 32:7 ב: and multitude of years should teach wisdom.
Job 32:8 א: But [there is] a spirit in man:
Job 32:8 ב: and the inspiration of the Almighty giveth them understanding.
Job 32:9 א: Great men are not [always] wise:
Job 32:9 ב: neither do the aged understand judgment.
Job 32:10 א: Therefore I said,
Job 32:10 ב: Hearken to me;
Job 32:10 ג: I also will shew mine opinion.
Job 32:11 א: Behold, I waited for your words;
Job 32:11 ב: I gave ear to your reasons,
Job 32:11 ג: whilst ye searched out what to say.
Job 32:12 א: Yea, I attended unto you, and, behold,
Job 32:12 ב: [there was] none [...] that convinced Job,
Job 32:12 ג: of you [...] [or] that answered his words:
Job 32:13 א: Lest ye should say, We have found out wisdom:
Job 32:13 ב: God thrusteth him down,
Job 32:13 ג: not man.
Job 32:14 א: Now he hath not directed [his] words against me:
Job 32:14 ב: neither will I answer him with your speeches.
Job 32:15 א: They were amazed,
Job 32:15 ב: they answered no more:
Job 32:15 ג: they left off speaking.
Job 32:16 א: When I had waited, (for they spake not,
Job 32:16 ב: but stood still,
Job 32:16 ג: [and] answered no more;)
Job 32:17 א: [I said], I will answer also my part,
Job 32:17 ב: I also will shew mine opinion.
Job 32:18 א: For I am full of matter,
Job 32:18 ב: the spirit within me constraineth me.
Job 32:19 א: Behold, my belly [is] as wine [which] hath no vent;
Job 32:19 ב: like new bottles.
Job 32:19 ג: it is ready to burst
Job 32:20 א: I will speak, that I may be refreshed:
Job 32:20 ב: I will open my lips and answer.
Job 32:21 א: Let me not, I pray you, accept any man’s person,
Job 32:21 ב: neither let me give flattering titles unto man.
Job 32:22 א: For I know not to give flattering titles;
Job 32:22 ב: [in so doing] my maker would soon take me away.
Job 33:1 א: Wherefore, Job, I pray thee, hear my speeches,
Job 33:1 ב: and hearken to all my words.
Job 33:2 א: Behold, now I have opened my mouth,
Job 33:2 ב: my tongue hath spoken in my mouth.
Job 33:3 א: My words [shall be of] the uprightness of my heart:
Job 33:3 ב: and my lips shall utter knowledge clearly.
Job 33:4 א: The Spirit of God hath made me,
Job 33:4 ב: and the breath of the Almighty hath given me life.
Job 33:5 א: If thou canst answer me,
Job 33:5 ב: set [thy words] in order before me,
Job 33:5 ג: stand up.
Job 33:6 א: Behold, I [am] according to thy wish in God’s stead:
Job 33:6 ב: I also am formed out of the clay.
Job 33:7 א: Behold, my terror shall not make thee afraid,
Job 33:7 ב: neither shall my hand be heavy upon thee.
Job 33:8 א: Surely thou hast spoken in mine hearing,
Job 33:8 ב: and I have heard the voice of [thy] words, [saying],
Job 33:9 א: I am clean without transgression,
Job 33:9 ב: I [am] innocent;
Job 33:9 ג: neither [is there] iniquity in me.
Job 33:10 א: Behold, he findeth occasions against me,
Job 33:10 ב: he counteth me for his enemy,
Job 33:11 א: He putteth my feet in the stocks,
Job 33:11 ב: he marketh all my paths.
Job 33:12 א: Behold, [in] this thou art not just:
Job 33:12 ב: I will answer thee,
Job 33:12 ג: that God is greater than man.
Job 33:13 א: Why dost thou strive against him?
Job 33:13 ב: for he giveth not account of any of his matters.
Job 33:14 א: For God speaketh once,
Job 33:14 ב: yea twice,
Job 33:14 ג: [yet man] perceiveth it not.
Job 33:15 א: In a dream, in a vision of the night,
Job 33:15 ב: when deep sleep falleth upon men,
Job 33:15 ג: in slumberings upon the bed;
Job 33:16 א: Then he openeth the ears of men,
Job 33:16 ב: and sealeth their instruction,
Job 33:17 א: That he may withdraw man [from his] purpose,
Job 33:17 ב: and hide pride from man.
Job 33:18 א: He keepeth back his soul from the pit,
Job 33:18 ב: and his life from perishing by the sword.
Job 33:19 א: He is chastened also with pain upon his bed,
Job 33:19 ב: and the multitude of his bones with strong [pain]:
Job 33:20 א: So that his life abhorreth bread,
Job 33:20 ב: and his soul dainty meat.
Job 33:21 א: His flesh is consumed away, that it cannot be seen;
Job 33:21 ב: and his bones [that] were not seen stick out.
Job 33:22 א: Yea, his soul draweth near unto the grave,
Job 33:22 ב: and his life to the destroyers.
Job 33:23 א: If there be a messenger with him, an interpreter,
Job 33:23 ב: one among a thousand,
Job 33:23 ג: to shew unto man his uprightness:
Job 33:24 א: Then he is gracious unto him, and saith,
Job 33:24 ב: Deliver him from going down to the pit:
Job 33:24 ג: I have found a ransom.
Job 33:25 א: His flesh shall be fresher than a child’s:
Job 33:25 ב: he shall return to the days of his youth:
Job 33:26 א: He shall pray unto God, and he will be favourable unto him:
Job 33:26 ב: and he shall see his face with joy:
Job 33:26 ג: for he will render unto man his righteousness.
Job 33:27 א: He looketh upon men, and [if any] say,
Job 33:27 ב: I have sinned,
Job 33:27 ג: and perverted [that which was] right,
Job 33:27 ד: and it profited me not;
Job 33:28 א: He will deliver his soul from going into the pit,
Job 33:28 ב: and his life shall see the light.
Job 33:29 א: Lo, all these [things] worketh God
Job 33:29 ב: oftentimes with man,
Job 33:30 א: To bring back his soul from the pit,
Job 33:30 ב: to be enlightened with the light of the living.
Job 33:31 א: Mark well, O Job,
Job 33:31 ב: hearken unto me:
Job 33:31 ג: hold thy peace, and I will speak.
Job 33:32 א: If thou hast any thing to say, answer me:
Job 33:32 ב: speak, for I desire to justify thee.
Job 33:33 א: If not,
Job 33:33 ב: hearken unto me:
Job 33:33 ג: hold thy peace, and I shall teach thee wisdom.
Job 34:1 א: Furthermore Elihu answered and said,
Job 34:2 א: Hear my words, O ye wise [men];
Job 34:2 ב: and give ear unto me, ye that have knowledge.
Job 34:3 א: For the ear trieth words,
Job 34:3 ב: as the mouth tasteth meat.
Job 34:4 א: Let us choose to us judgment:
Job 34:4 ב: let us know among ourselves what [is] good.
Job 34:5 א: For Job hath said, I am righteous:
Job 34:5 ב: and God hath taken away my judgment.
Job 34:6 א: Should I lie against my right?
Job 34:6 ב: my wound [is] incurable without transgression.
Job 34:7 א: What man [is] like Job,
Job 34:7 ב: [who] drinketh up scorning like water?
Job 34:8 א: Which goeth in company with the workers of iniquity,
Job 34:8 ב: and walketh with wicked men.
Job 34:9 א: For he hath said,
Job 34:9 ב: It profiteth a man nothing
Job 34:9 ג: that he should delight himself with God.
Job 34:10 א: Therefore hearken unto me, ye men of understanding:
Job 34:10 ב: far be it from God, [that he should do] wickedness;
Job 34:10 ג: and [from] the Almighty, [that he should commit] iniquity.
Job 34:11 א: For the work of a man shall he render unto him,
Job 34:11 ב: and cause every man to find according to [his] ways.
Job 34:12 א: Yea, surely God will not do wickedly,
Job 34:12 ב: neither will the Almighty pervert judgment.
Job 34:13 א: Who hath given him a charge over the earth?
Job 34:13 ב: or who hath disposed the whole world?
Job 34:14 א: If he set his heart upon man,
Job 34:14 ב: [if] he gather unto himself his spirit and his breath;
Job 34:15 א: All flesh shall perish together,
Job 34:15 ב: and man shall turn again unto dust.
Job 34:16 א: If now [thou hast] understanding, hear this:
Job 34:16 ב: hearken to the voice of my words.
Job 34:17 א: Shall even he that hateth right govern?
Job 34:17 ב: and wilt thou condemn him that is most just?
Job 34:18 א: [Is it fit] to say to a king, [Thou art] wicked?
Job 34:18 ב: [and] to princes, [Ye are] ungodly?
Job 34:19 א: [How much less to him] that accepteth not the persons of princes,
Job 34:19 ב: nor regardeth the rich more than the poor?
Job 34:19 ג: for they all [are] the work of his hands.
Job 34:20 א: In a moment shall they die,
Job 34:20 ב: and the people shall be troubled at midnight, and pass away:
Job 34:20 ג: and the mighty shall be taken away without hand.
Job 34:21 א: For his eyes [are] upon the ways of man,
Job 34:21 ב: and he seeth all his goings.
Job 34:22 א: [There is] no darkness, nor shadow of death,
Job 34:22 ב: where the workers of iniquity may hide themselves.
Job 34:23 א: For [...] not [...] upon man
Job 34:23 ב: he will [...] lay [...] more [than right];
Job 34:23 ג: that he should enter into judgment with God.
Job 34:24 א: He shall break in pieces mighty men without number,
Job 34:24 ב: and set others in their stead.
Job 34:25 א: Therefore he knoweth their works,
Job 34:25 ב: and he overturneth [them] in the night, so that they are destroyed.
Job 34:26 א: as wicked men
Job 34:26 ב: He striketh them [...] in the open sight of others;
Job 34:27 א: Because they turned back from him,
Job 34:27 ב: and would not consider any of his ways:
Job 34:28 א: So that they cause the cry of the poor to come unto him,
Job 34:28 ב: and he heareth the cry of the afflicted.
Job 34:29 א: When he giveth quietness, who then can make trouble?
Job 34:29 ב: and when he hideth [his] face, who then can behold him?
Job 34:29 ג: whether [it be done] against a nation,
Job 34:29 ד: or against a man only:
Job 34:30 א: That the hypocrite reign not,
Job 34:30 ב: lest the people be ensnared.
Job 34:31 א: Surely it is meet to be said unto God,
Job 34:31 ב: I have borne [chastisement], I will not offend [any more]:
Job 34:32 א: [That which] I see not
Job 34:32 ב: teach thou me:
Job 34:32 ג: if I have done iniquity,
Job 34:32 ד: I will do no more.
Job 34:33 א: [Should it be] according to thy mind? he will recompense it,
Job 34:33 ב: whether thou refuse, or whether thou choose;
Job 34:33 ג: and not I:
Job 34:33 ד: therefore speak what thou knowest.
Job 34:34 א: Let men of understanding tell me,
Job 34:34 ב: and let a wise man hearken unto me.
Job 34:35 א: Job hath spoken without knowledge,
Job 34:35 ב: and his words [were] without wisdom.
Job 34:36 א: My desire [is that] Job may be tried unto the end
Job 34:36 ב: because of [his] answers for wicked men.
Job 34:37 א: For he addeth rebellion unto his sin,
Job 34:37 ב: he clappeth [his hands] among us,
Job 34:37 ג: and multiplieth his words against God.
Job 35:1 א: Elihu spake moreover, and said,
Job 35:2 א: Thinkest thou this to be right,
Job 35:2 ב: [that] thou saidst, My righteousness [is] more than God’s?
Job 35:3 א: For thou saidst,
Job 35:3 ב: What advantage will it be unto thee?
Job 35:3 ג: [and], What profit shall I have, [if I be cleansed] from my sin?
Job 35:4 א: I will answer thee,
Job 35:4 ב: and thy companions with thee.
Job 35:5 א: Look unto the heavens, and see; and behold
Job 35:5 ב: the clouds [which] are higher than thou.
Job 35:6 א: If thou sinnest,
Job 35:6 ב: what doest thou against him?
Job 35:6 ג: or [if] thy transgressions be multiplied,
Job 35:6 ד: what doest thou unto him?
Job 35:7 א: If thou be righteous,
Job 35:7 ב: what givest thou him?
Job 35:7 ג: or what receiveth he of thine hand?
Job 35:8 א: Thy wickedness [may hurt] a man as thou [art];
Job 35:8 ב: and thy righteousness [may profit] the son of man.
Job 35:9 א: By reason of the multitude of oppressions [...] they cry out
Job 35:9 ב: they make [the oppressed] to cry: [...] by reason of the arm of the mighty.
Job 35:10 א: But none saith,
Job 35:10 ב: Where [is] God my maker,
Job 35:10 ג: who giveth songs in the night;
Job 35:11 א: Who teacheth us more than the beasts of the earth,
Job 35:11 ב: and maketh us wiser than the fowls of heaven?
Job 35:12 א: There they cry, but none giveth answer,
Job 35:12 ב: because of the pride of evil men.
Job 35:13 א: Surely God will not hear vanity,
Job 35:13 ב: neither will the Almighty regard it.
Job 35:14 א: Although thou sayest
Job 35:14 ב: thou shalt not see him,
Job 35:14 ג: [yet] judgment [is] before him; therefore trust thou in him.
Job 35:15 א: But now, because [it is] not [so],
Job 35:15 ב: he hath visited in his anger;
Job 35:15 ג: yet he knoweth [it] not in great extremity:
Job 35:16 א: Therefore doth Job open his mouth in vain;
Job 35:16 ב: without knowledge.
Job 35:16 ג: he multiplieth words
Job 36:1 א: Elihu also proceeded, and said,
Job 36:2 א: Suffer me a little,
Job 36:2 ב: and I will shew thee that [I have] yet to speak on God’s behalf.
Job 36:3 א: I will fetch my knowledge from afar,
Job 36:3 ב: and will ascribe righteousness to my Maker.
Job 36:4 א: For truly my words [shall] not [be] false:
Job 36:4 ב: he that is perfect in knowledge [is] with thee.
Job 36:5 א: Behold, God [is] mighty,
Job 36:5 ב: and despiseth not [any: he is] mighty in strength [and] wisdom.
Job 36:6 א: He preserveth not the life of the wicked:
Job 36:6 ב: but giveth right to the poor.
Job 36:7 א: He withdraweth not his eyes from the righteous:
Job 36:7 ב: but with kings [are they] on the throne;
Job 36:7 ג: yea, he doth establish them for ever,
Job 36:7 ד: and they are exalted.
Job 36:8 א: And if [they be] bound in fetters,
Job 36:8 ב: [and] be holden in cords of affliction;
Job 36:9 א: Then he sheweth them their work,
Job 36:9 ב: and their transgressions that they have exceeded.
Job 36:10 א: He openeth also their ear to discipline,
Job 36:10 ב: and commandeth that they return from iniquity.
Job 36:11 א: If they obey and serve [him],
Job 36:11 ב: they shall spend their days in prosperity,
Job 36:11 ג: and their years in pleasures.
Job 36:12 א: But if they obey not,
Job 36:12 ב: they shall perish by the sword,
Job 36:12 ג: and they shall die without knowledge.
Job 36:13 א: But the hypocrites in heart heap up wrath:
Job 36:13 ב: they cry not
Job 36:13 ג: when he bindeth them.
Job 36:14 א: They die in youth,
Job 36:14 ב: and their life [is] among the unclean.
Job 36:15 א: He delivereth the poor in his affliction,
Job 36:15 ב: and openeth their ears in oppression.
Job 36:16 א: Even so would he have removed thee
Job 36:16 ב: out of the strait [into] a broad place,
Job 36:16 ג: where [there is] no straitness;
Job 36:16 ד: and that which should be set on thy table [should be] full of fatness.
Job 36:17 א: But thou hast fulfilled the judgment of the wicked:
Job 36:17 ב: judgment and justice take hold [on thee].
Job 36:18 א: Because [there is] wrath,
Job 36:18 ב: [beware] lest he take thee away with [his] stroke: then a great ransom
Job 36:18 ג: cannot deliver thee.
Job 36:19 א: Will he esteem thy riches?
Job 36:19 ב: [no], not gold, nor all the forces of strength.
Job 36:20 א: Desire not the night,
Job 36:20 ב: when people are cut off in their place.
Job 36:21 א: Take heed,
Job 36:21 ב: regard not iniquity:
Job 36:21 ג: for this hast thou chosen rather than affliction.
Job 36:22 א: Behold, God exalteth by his power:
Job 36:22 ב: who teacheth like him?
Job 36:23 א: Who hath enjoined him his way?
Job 36:23 ב: or who can say, Thou hast wrought iniquity?
Job 36:24 א: Remember that thou magnify his work,
Job 36:24 ב: which men behold.
Job 36:25 א: Every man may see it;
Job 36:25 ב: man may behold [it] afar off.
Job 36:26 א: Behold, God [is] great,
Job 36:26 ב: and we know [him] not, [...] the number of his years
Job 36:26 ג: neither can [...] be searched out.
Job 36:27 א: For he maketh small the drops of water:
Job 36:27 ב: they pour down rain according to the vapour thereof:
Job 36:28 א: Which the clouds do drop
Job 36:28 ב: [and] distil upon man abundantly.
Job 36:29 א: Also can [any] understand
Job 36:29 ב: the spreadings of the clouds, [or] the noise of his tabernacle?
Job 36:30 א: Behold, he spreadeth his light upon it,
Job 36:30 ב: and covereth the bottom of the sea.
Job 36:31 א: For by them judgeth he the people;
Job 36:31 ב: he giveth meat in abundance.
Job 36:32 א: With clouds he covereth the light;
Job 36:32 ב: and commandeth it [not to shine] by [the cloud] that cometh betwixt.
Job 36:33 א: The noise thereof sheweth concerning it,
Job 36:33 ב: the cattle also concerning the vapour.
Job 37:1 א: At this also my heart trembleth,
Job 37:1 ב: and is moved out of his place.
Job 37:2 א: Hear attentively the noise of his voice,
Job 37:2 ב: and the sound [that] goeth out of his mouth.
Job 37:3 א: He directeth it under the whole heaven,
Job 37:3 ב: and his lightning unto the ends of the earth.
Job 37:4 א: After it a voice roareth:
Job 37:4 ב: he thundereth with the voice of his excellency;
Job 37:4 ג: and he will not stay them
Job 37:4 ד: when his voice is heard.
Job 37:5 א: God thundereth [...] with his voice;
Job 37:5 ב: marvellously [...] great things doeth he,
Job 37:5 ג: which we cannot comprehend.
Job 37:6 א: For he saith to the snow,
Job 37:6 ב: Be thou [on] the earth;
Job 37:6 ג: likewise to the small rain,
Job 37:6 ד: and to the great rain of his strength.
Job 37:7 א: He sealeth up the hand of every man;
Job 37:7 ב: that all men may know his work.
Job 37:8 א: Then the beasts go into dens,
Job 37:8 ב: and remain in their places.
Job 37:9 א: Out of the south cometh the whirlwind:
Job 37:9 ב: and cold out of the north.
Job 37:10 א: By the breath of God frost is given:
Job 37:10 ב: and the breadth of the waters is straitened.
Job 37:11 א: Also by watering he wearieth the thick cloud:
Job 37:11 ב: he scattereth his bright cloud:
Job 37:12 א: And it is turned round about by his counsels:
Job 37:12 ב: that they may do whatsoever he commandeth them
Job 37:12 ג: upon the face of the world in the earth.
Job 37:13 א: whether for correction,
Job 37:13 ב: or for his land,
Job 37:13 ג: or for mercy.
Job 37:13 ד: He causeth it to come,
Job 37:14 א: Hearken unto this, O Job:
Job 37:14 ב: stand still, and consider the wondrous works of God.
Job 37:15 א: Dost thou know when God disposed them,
Job 37:15 ב: and caused the light of his cloud to shine?
Job 37:16 א: Dost thou know the balancings of the clouds,
Job 37:16 ב: the wondrous works of him which is perfect in knowledge?
Job 37:17 א: How thy garments [are] warm,
Job 37:17 ב: when he quieteth the earth by the south [wind]?
Job 37:18 א: Hast thou with him spread out the sky,
Job 37:18 ב: [which is] strong, [and] as a molten looking glass?
Job 37:19 א: Teach us what we shall say unto him;
Job 37:19 ב: [for] we cannot order [our speech] by reason of darkness.
Job 37:20 א: Shall it be told him that I speak?
Job 37:20 ב: if a man speak,
Job 37:20 ג: surely he shall be swallowed up.
Job 37:21 א: And now [men] see not the bright light
Job 37:21 ב: which [is] in the clouds:
Job 37:21 ג: but the wind passeth, and cleanseth them.
Job 37:22 א: Fair weather cometh out of the north:
Job 37:22 ב: with God [is] terrible majesty.
Job 37:23 א: [Touching] the Almighty, we cannot find him out:
Job 37:23 ב: [he is] excellent in power, and in judgment, and in plenty of justice:
Job 37:23 ג: he will not afflict.
Job 37:24 א: Men do therefore fear him:
Job 37:24 ב: he respecteth not any [that are] wise of heart.
Job 38:1 א: Then the LORD answered Job
Job 38:1 ב: out of the whirlwind, and said,
Job 38:2 א: Who [is] this that darkeneth counsel
Job 38:2 ב: by words without knowledge?
Job 38:3 א: Gird up now thy loins like a man;
Job 38:3 ב: for I will demand of thee, and answer thou me.
Job 38:4 א: Where wast thou when I laid the foundations of the earth?
Job 38:4 ב: declare, if thou hast understanding.
Job 38:5 א: Who hath laid the measures thereof,
Job 38:5 ב: if thou knowest?
Job 38:5 ג: or who hath stretched the line upon it?
Job 38:6 א: Whereupon are the foundations thereof fastened?
Job 38:6 ב: or who laid the corner stone thereof;
Job 38:7 א: When the morning stars sang together,
Job 38:7 ב: and all the sons of God shouted for joy?
Job 38:8 א: Or [who] shut up the sea with doors,
Job 38:8 ב: when it brake forth, [as if] it had issued out of the womb?
Job 38:9 א: When I made the cloud the garment thereof,
Job 38:9 ב: and thick darkness a swaddlingband for it,
Job 38:10 א: And brake up for it my decreed [place],
Job 38:10 ב: and set bars and doors,
Job 38:11 א: And said, Hitherto shalt thou come,
Job 38:11 ב: but no further:
Job 38:11 ג: and here shall thy proud waves be stayed?
Job 38:12 א: Hast thou commanded the morning since thy days;
Job 38:12 ב: [and] caused the dayspring to know his place;
Job 38:13 א: That it might take hold of the ends of the earth,
Job 38:13 ב: that the wicked might be shaken out of it?
Job 38:14 א: It is turned as clay [to] the seal;
Job 38:14 ב: and they stand as a garment.
Job 38:15 א: And from the wicked their light is withholden,
Job 38:15 ב: and the high arm shall be broken.
Job 38:16 א: Hast thou entered into the springs of the sea?
Job 38:16 ב: or hast thou walked in the search of the depth?
Job 38:17 א: Have the gates of death been opened unto thee?
Job 38:17 ב: or hast thou seen the doors of the shadow of death?
Job 38:18 א: Hast thou perceived the breadth of the earth?
Job 38:18 ב: declare if thou knowest it all.
Job 38:19 א: Where [is] the way [where] light dwelleth?
Job 38:19 ב: and [as for] darkness, where [is] the place thereof,
Job 38:20 א: That thou shouldest take it to the bound thereof,
Job 38:20 ב: and that thou shouldest know the paths [to] the house thereof?
Job 38:21 א: Knowest thou [it], because thou wast then born?
Job 38:21 ב: or [because] the number of thy days [is] great?
Job 38:22 א: Hast thou entered into the treasures of the snow?
Job 38:22 ב: or hast thou seen the treasures of the hail,
Job 38:23 א: Which I have reserved against the time of trouble,
Job 38:23 ב: against the day of battle and war?
Job 38:24 א: By what way is the light parted,
Job 38:24 ב: [which] scattereth the east wind upon the earth?
Job 38:25 א: Who hath divided a watercourse for the overflowing of waters,
Job 38:25 ב: or a way for the lightning of thunder;
Job 38:26 א: To cause it to rain on the earth,
Job 38:26 ב: [where] no man [is; on] the wilderness,
Job 38:26 ג: wherein [there is] no man;
Job 38:27 א: To satisfy the desolate and waste [ground];
Job 38:27 ב: and to cause the bud of the tender herb to spring forth?
Job 38:28 א: Hath the rain a father?
Job 38:28 ב: or who hath begotten the drops of dew?
Job 38:29 א: Out of whose womb came the ice?
Job 38:29 ב: and the hoary frost of heaven, who hath gendered it?
Job 38:30 א: The waters are hid as [with] a stone,
Job 38:30 ב: and the face of the deep is frozen.
Job 38:31 א: Canst thou bind the sweet influences of Pleiades,
Job 38:31 ב: or loose the bands of Orion?
Job 38:32 א: Canst thou bring forth Mazzaroth in his season?
Job 38:32 ב: or canst thou guide Arcturus with his sons?
Job 38:33 א: Knowest thou the ordinances of heaven?
Job 38:33 ב: canst thou set the dominion thereof in the earth?
Job 38:34 א: Canst thou lift up thy voice to the clouds,
Job 38:34 ב: that abundance of waters may cover thee?
Job 38:35 א: Canst thou send lightnings, that they may go,
Job 38:35 ב: and say unto thee,
Job 38:35 ג: Here we [are]?
Job 38:36 א: Who hath put wisdom in the inward parts?
Job 38:36 ב: or who hath given understanding to the heart?
Job 38:37 א: Who can number the clouds in wisdom?
Job 38:37 ב: or who can stay the bottles of heaven,
Job 38:38 א: When the dust groweth into hardness,
Job 38:38 ב: and the clods cleave fast together?
Job 38:39 א: Wilt thou hunt the prey for the lion?
Job 38:39 ב: or fill the appetite of the young lions,
Job 38:40 א: When they couch in [their] dens,
Job 38:40 ב: [and] abide in the covert to lie in wait?
Job 38:41 א: Who provideth for the raven his food?
Job 38:41 ב: when his young ones cry unto God,
Job 38:41 ג: they wander for lack of meat.
Job 39:1 א: Knowest thou the time when the wild goats of the rock bring forth?
Job 39:1 ב: [or] canst thou mark when the hinds do calve?
Job 39:2 א: Canst thou number the months [that] they fulfil?
Job 39:2 ב: or knowest thou the time when they bring forth?
Job 39:3 א: They bow themselves, they bring forth their young ones,
Job 39:3 ב: they cast out their sorrows.
Job 39:4 א: Their young ones are in good liking,
Job 39:4 ב: they grow up with corn;
Job 39:4 ג: they go forth, and return not unto them.
Job 39:5 א: Who hath sent out the wild ass free?
Job 39:5 ב: or who hath loosed the bands of the wild ass?
Job 39:6 א: Whose house I have made the wilderness,
Job 39:6 ב: and the barren land his dwellings.
Job 39:7 א: He scorneth the multitude of the city,
Job 39:7 ב: neither regardeth he the crying of the driver.
Job 39:8 א: The range of the mountains [is] his pasture,
Job 39:8 ב: and he searcheth after every green thing.
Job 39:9 א: Will the unicorn be willing to serve thee,
Job 39:9 ב: or abide by thy crib?
Job 39:10 א: Canst thou bind the unicorn with his band in the furrow?
Job 39:10 ב: or will he harrow the valleys after thee?
Job 39:11 א: Wilt thou trust him, because his strength [is] great?
Job 39:11 ב: or wilt thou leave thy labour to him?
Job 39:12 א: Wilt thou believe him, that he will bring home thy seed,
Job 39:12 ב: and gather [it into] thy barn?
Job 39:13 א: [Gavest thou] the goodly wings unto the peacocks?
Job 39:13 ב: or wings and feathers unto the ostrich?
Job 39:14 א: Which leaveth her eggs in the earth,
Job 39:14 ב: and warmeth them in dust,
Job 39:15 א: And forgetteth that the foot may crush them,
Job 39:15 ב: or that the wild beast may break them.
Job 39:16 א: She is hardened against her young ones, as though [they were] not hers:
Job 39:16 ב: her labour is in vain without fear;
Job 39:17 א: Because God hath deprived her of wisdom,
Job 39:17 ב: neither hath he imparted to her understanding.
Job 39:18 א: What time she lifteth up herself on high,
Job 39:18 ב: she scorneth the horse and his rider.
Job 39:19 א: Hast thou given the horse strength?
Job 39:19 ב: hast thou clothed his neck with thunder?
Job 39:20 א: Canst thou make him afraid as a grasshopper?
Job 39:20 ב: the glory of his nostrils [is] terrible.
Job 39:21 א: He paweth in the valley, and rejoiceth in [his] strength:
Job 39:21 ב: he goeth on to meet the armed men.
Job 39:22 א: He mocketh at fear, and is not affrighted;
Job 39:22 ב: neither turneth he back from the sword.
Job 39:23 א: The quiver rattleth against him,
Job 39:23 ב: the glittering spear and the shield.
Job 39:24 א: He swalloweth the ground with fierceness and rage:
Job 39:24 ב: neither believeth he that [it is] the sound of the trumpet.
Job 39:25 א: He saith among the trumpets, Ha, ha;
Job 39:25 ב: and he smelleth the battle afar off,
Job 39:25 ג: the thunder of the captains, and the shouting.
Job 39:26 א: Doth the hawk fly by thy wisdom,
Job 39:26 ב: [and] stretch her wings toward the south?
Job 39:27 א: Doth the eagle mount up at thy command,
Job 39:27 ב: and make her nest on high?
Job 39:28 א: She dwelleth and abideth on the rock,
Job 39:28 ב: upon the crag of the rock, and the strong place.
Job 39:29 א: From thence she seeketh the prey,
Job 39:29 ב: [and] her eyes behold afar off.
Job 39:30 א: Her young ones also suck up blood:
Job 39:30 ב: and where the slain [are], there [is] she.
Job 40:1 א: Moreover the LORD answered Job, and said,
Job 40:2 א: Shall he that contendeth with the Almighty instruct [him]?
Job 40:2 ב: he that reproveth God, let him answer it.
Job 40:3 א: Then Job answered the LORD, and said,
Job 40:4 א: Behold, I am vile;
Job 40:4 ב: what shall I answer thee?
Job 40:4 ג: I will lay mine hand upon my mouth.
Job 40:5 א: Once have I spoken; but I will not answer:
Job 40:5 ב: yea, twice; but I will proceed no further.
Job 40:6 א: Then answered the LORD unto Job
Job 40:6 ב: out of the whirlwind,
Job 40:6 ג: and said,
Job 40:7 א: Gird up thy loins now like a man:
Job 40:7 ב: I will demand of thee, and declare thou unto me.
Job 40:8 א: Wilt thou also disannul my judgment?
Job 40:8 ב: wilt thou condemn me, that thou mayest be righteous?
Job 40:9 א: Hast thou an arm like God?
Job 40:9 ב: or canst thou thunder with a voice like him?
Job 40:10 א: Deck thyself now [with] majesty and excellency;
Job 40:10 ב: and array thyself with glory and beauty.
Job 40:11 א: Cast abroad the rage of thy wrath:
Job 40:11 ב: and behold every one [that is] proud,
Job 40:11 ג: and abase him.
Job 40:12 א: Look on every one [that is] proud,
Job 40:12 ב: [and] bring him low;
Job 40:12 ג: and tread down the wicked in their place.
Job 40:13 א: Hide them in the dust together;
Job 40:13 ב: [and] bind their faces in secret.
Job 40:14 א: Then will I also confess unto thee
Job 40:14 ב: that thine own right hand can save thee.
Job 40:15 א: Behold now behemoth, which I made with thee;
Job 40:15 ב: he eateth grass as an ox.
Job 40:16 א: Lo now, his strength [is] in his loins,
Job 40:16 ב: and his force [is] in the navel of his belly.
Job 40:17 א: He moveth his tail like a cedar:
Job 40:17 ב: the sinews of his stones are wrapped together.
Job 40:18 א: His bones [are as] strong pieces of brass;
Job 40:18 ב: his bones [are] like bars of iron.
Job 40:19 א: He [is] the chief of the ways of God:
Job 40:19 ב: he that made him can make his sword to approach [unto him].
Job 40:20 א: Surely the mountains bring him forth food,
Job 40:20 ב: where all the beasts of the field play.
Job 40:21 א: He lieth under the shady trees,
Job 40:21 ב: in the covert of the reed, and fens.
Job 40:22 א: The shady trees cover him [with] their shadow;
Job 40:22 ב: the willows of the brook compass him about.
Job 40:23 א: Behold, he drinketh up a river,
Job 40:23 ב: [and] hasteth not:
Job 40:23 ג: he trusteth that he can draw up Jordan into his mouth.
Job 40:24 א: He taketh it with his eyes:
Job 40:24 ב: [his] nose pierceth through snares.
Job 41:1 א: Canst thou draw out leviathan with an hook?
Job 41:1 ב: or his tongue with a cord [which] thou lettest down?
Job 41:2 א: Canst thou put an hook into his nose?
Job 41:2 ב: or bore his jaw through with a thorn?
Job 41:3 א: Will he make many supplications unto thee?
Job 41:3 ב: will he speak soft [words] unto thee?
Job 41:4 א: Will he make a covenant with thee?
Job 41:4 ב: wilt thou take him for a servant for ever?
Job 41:5 א: Wilt thou play with him as [with] a bird?
Job 41:5 ב: or wilt thou bind him for thy maidens?
Job 41:6 א: Shall the companions make a banquet of him?
Job 41:6 ב: shall they part him among the merchants?
Job 41:7 א: Canst thou fill his skin with barbed irons?
Job 41:7 ב: or his head with fish spears?
Job 41:8 א: Lay thine hand upon him,
Job 41:8 ב: remember the battle,
Job 41:8 ג: do no more.
Job 41:9 א: Behold, the hope of him is in vain:
Job 41:9 ב: shall not [one] be cast down even at the sight of him?
Job 41:10 א: None [is so] fierce that dare stir him up:
Job 41:10 ב: who then is able to stand before me?
Job 41:11 א: Who hath prevented me, that I should repay [him?
Job 41:11 ב: whatsoever is] under the whole heaven is mine.
Job 41:12 א: I will not conceal his parts,
Job 41:12 ב: nor his power, nor his comely proportion.
Job 41:13 א: Who can discover the face of his garment?
Job 41:13 ב: [or] who can come [to him] with his double bridle?
Job 41:14 א: Who can open the doors of his face?
Job 41:14 ב: his teeth [are] terrible round about.
Job 41:15 א: [His] scales [are his] pride,
Job 41:15 ב: shut up together [as with] a close seal.
Job 41:16 א: One is so near to another,
Job 41:16 ב: that no air can come between them.
Job 41:17 א: They are joined one to another,
Job 41:17 ב: they stick together, that they cannot be sundered.
Job 41:18 א: By his neesings a light doth shine,
Job 41:18 ב: and his eyes [are] like the eyelids of the morning.
Job 41:19 א: Out of his mouth go burning lamps,
Job 41:19 ב: [and] sparks of fire leap out.
Job 41:20 א: Out of his nostrils goeth smoke,
Job 41:20 ב: as [out] of a seething pot or caldron.
Job 41:21 א: His breath kindleth coals,
Job 41:21 ב: and a flame goeth out of his mouth.
Job 41:22 א: In his neck remaineth strength,
Job 41:22 ב: and sorrow is turned into joy before him.
Job 41:23 א: The flakes of his flesh are joined together:
Job 41:23 ב: they are firm in themselves; they cannot be moved.
Job 41:24 א: His heart is as firm as a stone;
Job 41:24 ב: yea, as hard as a piece of the nether [millstone].
Job 41:25 א: When he raiseth up himself, the mighty are afraid:
Job 41:25 ב: by reason of breakings they purify themselves.
Job 41:26 א: The sword of him that layeth at him cannot hold:
Job 41:26 ב: the spear, the dart, nor the habergeon.
Job 41:27 א: He esteemeth iron as straw,
Job 41:27 ב: [and] brass as rotten wood.
Job 41:28 א: The arrow cannot make him flee:
Job 41:28 ב: slingstones are turned with him into stubble.
Job 41:29 א: Darts are counted as stubble:
Job 41:29 ב: he laugheth at the shaking of a spear.
Job 41:30 א: Sharp stones [are] under him:
Job 41:30 ב: he spreadeth sharp pointed things upon the mire.
Job 41:31 א: He maketh the deep to boil like a pot:
Job 41:31 ב: he maketh the sea like a pot of ointment.
Job 41:32 א: He maketh a path to shine after him;
Job 41:32 ב: [one] would think the deep [to be] hoary.
Job 41:33 א: Upon earth there is not his like,
Job 41:33 ב: who is made without fear.
Job 41:34 א: He beholdeth all high [things]:
Job 41:34 ב: he [is] a king over all the children of pride.
Job 42:1 א: Then Job answered the LORD, and said,
Job 42:2 א: I know that thou canst do every [thing],
Job 42:2 ב: and [that] no thought can be withholden from thee.
Job 42:3 א: Who [is] he that hideth counsel without knowledge?
Job 42:3 ב: therefore have I uttered that I understood not;
Job 42:3 ג: things too wonderful for me, which I knew not.
Job 42:4 א: Hear, I beseech thee, and I will speak:
Job 42:4 ב: I will demand of thee, and declare thou unto me.
Job 42:5 א: I have heard of thee by the hearing of the ear:
Job 42:5 ב: but now mine eye seeth thee.
Job 42:6 א: Wherefore I abhor [myself],
Job 42:6 ב: and repent in dust and ashes.
Job 42:7 א: And it was [so], that after the LORD had spoken
Job 42:7 ב: these words unto Job,
Job 42:7 ג: the LORD said to Eliphaz the Temanite,
Job 42:7 ד: My wrath is kindled against thee,
Job 42:7 ה: and against thy two friends:
Job 42:7 ו: for ye have not spoken of me [the thing that is] right,
Job 42:7 ז: as my servant Job [hath].
Job 42:8 א: Therefore take unto you now
Job 42:8 ב: seven bullocks and seven rams,
Job 42:8 ג: and go to my servant Job,
Job 42:8 ד: and offer up for yourselves a burnt offering;
Job 42:8 ה: and my servant Job shall pray for you:
Job 42:8 ו: for him will I accept:
Job 42:8 ז: lest I deal with you [after your] folly,
Job 42:8 ח: in that ye have not spoken of me [the thing which is] right,
Job 42:8 ט: like my servant Job.
Job 42:9 א: So Eliphaz the Temanite [...] went,
Job 42:9 ב: and Bildad the Shuhite
Job 42:9 ג: [and] Zophar the Naamathite
Job 42:9 ד: and did according as the LORD commanded them:
Job 42:9 ה: the LORD also accepted Job.
Job 42:10 א: And the LORD turned the captivity of Job,
Job 42:10 ב: when he prayed for his friends:
Job 42:10 ג: also the LORD gave Job twice as much as he had before.
Job 42:11 א: Then came there unto him
Job 42:11 ב: all his brethren, and all his sisters,
Job 42:11 ג: and all they that had been of his acquaintance before,
Job 42:11 ד: and did eat bread with him in his house:
Job 42:11 ה: and they bemoaned him,
Job 42:11 ו: and comforted him
Job 42:11 ז: over all the evil that the LORD had brought upon him:
Job 42:11 ח: every man also gave him a piece of money,
Job 42:11 ט: and every one an earring of gold.
Job 42:12 א: So the LORD blessed the latter end of Job more than his beginning:
Job 42:12 ב: for he had
Job 42:12 ג: fourteen thousand sheep,
Job 42:12 ד: and six thousand camels,
Job 42:12 ה: and a thousand yoke of oxen,
Job 42:12 ו: and a thousand she asses.
Job 42:13 א: He had also
Job 42:13 ב: seven sons and three daughters.
Job 42:14 א: And he called the name of the first, Jemima;
Job 42:14 ב: and the name of the second, Kezia;
Job 42:14 ג: and the name of the third, Keren–happuch.
Job 42:15 א: And [...] were no women found [so] fair
Job 42:15 ב: in all the land [...] as the daughters of Job:
Job 42:15 ג: and their father gave them
Job 42:15 ד: inheritance among their brethren.
Job 42:16 א: After this lived Job
Job 42:16 ב: an hundred and forty years,
Job 42:16 ג: and saw his sons,
Job 42:16 ד: and his sons’ sons, [even]
Job 42:16 ה: four generations.
Job 42:17 א: So Job died,
Job 42:17 ב: [being] old and full of days.
